subject: Have you gotten your booster shot?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| TEXT JOIN TO 50224 TO GET IMPORTANT ACTION ALERTS FROM VOTER PROTECTION PROJECT! [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/128?t=1&akid=989%2E878179%2EPoVrjq)
---
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/booster_shot_poll/?source=VPP_20211204_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=7&akid=989%2E878179%2EPoVrjq) As the Omicron variant makes the need for COVID-19 booster shots increasingly clear, we need to hear from top Democrats like you, team: [Have you gotten your booster shot?](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/booster_shot_poll/?source=VPP_20211204_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=8&akid=989%2E878179%2EPoVrjq) | [YES »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/booster_shot_poll/?source=VPP_20211204_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=9&akid=989%2E878179%2EPoVrjq)

[UNSURE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/booster_shot_poll/?source=VPP_20211204_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=11&akid=989%2E878179%2EPoVrjq)
** 5,000 RESPONSES NEEDED BY MIDNIGHT **
PLEASE RESPOND IMMEDIATELY
Team, all Americans 18 and older are eligible to get their booster shot!

We know that the vaccine is **SAFE and EFFECTIVE** , and that nearly all hospitalizations are among the unvaccinated.

But Trump’s Republicans are carrying out a pathetic smear campaign to undermine faith in science, _and we need to make sure our supporters aren’t falling for their lies._
[So we need to hear from you immediately, team: Have you gotten your booster shot?](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/booster_shot_poll/?source=VPP_20211204_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=12&akid=989%2E878179%2EPoVrjq)
[YES »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/booster_shot_poll/?source=VPP_20211204_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=13&akid=989%2E878179%2EPoVrjq)
---
[NO »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/booster_shot_poll/?source=VPP_20211204_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=14&akid=989%2E878179%2EPoVrjq)
[UNSURE »](https://act.protectvoting.org/survey/booster_shot_poll/?source=VPP_20211204_EMPOLL_E3_T0_AC&t=15&akid=989%2E878179%2EPoVrjq)
** 5,000 RESPONSES NEEDED BY MIDNIGHT **
PLEASE RESPOND IMMEDIATELY
Thank you,

_VPP Polling Team_
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

[](ckq.io/eguhtk)

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To ending partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=2&akid=989%2E878179%2EPoVrjq). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=3&akid=989%2E878179%2EPoVrjq).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=4&akid=989%2E878179%2EPoVrjq) to request fewer emails. name: Senate Conservatives
subject: Stop the Coyote-in-Chief
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
| |
---
Peter:

It's true. The U.S. government really did charter secret flights to relocate illegal immigrants into our country in the middle of the night.

Just as the chaos in southern Texas **IS** Joe Biden's border policy, smuggling illegals into the country **IS** his immigration policy.
At this point, Biden is nothing more than **Coyote-in-Chief**.

His Homeland Security Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas finally admitted what everyone knew: the illegal immigrants Biden is letting into the country are bringing Covid-19 with them.

And his Vice President, Kamala Harris, who is supposedly _**IN CHARGE**_ of getting the border under control, is too busy auditioning child actors for her TV ads to bother.

Nor have Democrats in Congress lifted a finger to secure the border. They think the border is racist. They think immigration enforcement is racist. They think America is racist!

**[ Take a stand and help stop the Coyote-in-Chief! ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58936686:JngbCQEUN:m:1:3253819041:94373062DBC069D433E5B08EE5D5AC5A:r) **

Democrats are still in charge of our government for at least another year and a half. And they won't give up their anti-American bigotry unless we give them the political defeat of a lifetime next year.

** But we all know, it's not enough to turn blue Senate seats red. We need true conservative fighters like: **

✅ **Mo Brooks** in Alabama
✅ **Josh Mandel** in Ohio
✅ **Mike Lee** in Utah
✅ **Ron Johnson** in Wisconsin
✅ **Ted Budd** in North Carolina
✅ **Rand Paul** in Kentucky, and
✅ **Adam Laxalt** in Nevada.

**[ We need them ALL in the Senate! ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58936686:JngbCQEUN:m:1:3253819041:94373062DBC069D433E5B08EE5D5AC5A:r) **

They are not just Republicans and conservatives. They are patriots, ready to fight and sacrifice to rescue America from the woke, socialist fanatics leading us into inflation, crime, censorship, election corruption, defeat, and racist indoctrination.

Senate Conservatives Fund has already done so much to impact these Senate races and, with your help, we're going to win back the Senate not for a party, but _**for our nation**_.

**[ Please join us by making a split contribution to our endorsed Senate candidates today! ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58936686:JngbCQEUN:m:1:3253819041:94373062DBC069D433E5B08EE5D5AC5A:r) **

Together, we can build an earthquake election that fills the Senate with true conservatives who will fight for our future.

Thank you for considering this important request.

Sincerely,
Mary Vought
Executive Director
Senate Conservatives Fund
|
---
**END OF THE MONTH**
**COUNTDOWN**

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: We need to win this battle on the campuses
body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8136%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=2uhp3pfmEu2awPmivDQ%2btg&sysid=1)
[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19988%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cS6dm2GDPwVEFbOeWCH4ww&sysid=1) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19989%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=B8DVonnmU6IKWTcjNrNyZg&sysid=1) [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19988%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cS6dm2GDPwVEFbOeWCH4ww&sysid=1) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19980%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UhcXV6BAPbqA4wYfQFX0BQ&sysid=1) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students --the least affected by the disease -- must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19981%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YH0tm3htFnmlKQMX3FeYww&sysid=1) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c19982%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bnX7slWK9eeJU6BjetzvOQ&sysid=1) Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8136%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=2uhp3pfmEu2awPmivDQ%2btg&sysid=1)_

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8136%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=2uhp3pfmEu2awPmivDQ%2btg&sysid=1)

name: National Republican Polling
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from National Republican Polling is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zp9v1ic5a6bait7ge8gldi55uofaacnv7q83ridg_rp22sh2s8i66pj0stg64o32chh2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zpuk9oobk2e4s40etfgkeqcn6tt2u6lrqoc8bre0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0stg64o32chh2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2znlqlcffm535h1kcmhqvt9v0ran0gsg7i7dviajg_rp22sh2s8i66pj0stg64o32chh2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Pro Life Update
subject: The key to Lincoln’s rhetorical success
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
[View this message in your browser](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zt5r09fieh6cvfmsje9qsncnbsed91t22u18la78_rp22sh2s8i66pj0stg64o33cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq0sjnm6qb6d9le1oj8cbl6ej3fddnkgp7cc5kmdqjf972u9hf9d9i6qrm0p9ke2pnccdh6ji67djlm9on4pr1c4q71ojkskqmeorhmerb9clie1jt4s3ic9j71cj6e3ib6or0eao6csbn6dgmfdj6coon1cj6c3gbaor0s2qj2cdl66qn49fg)

---|---
| | Dear fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zudkjb4bgs0frobgfj1bbie66epi6t8s2g4qg2m8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0stg64o33cth2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zdu42tpk6io4kuoljg42t5afulmdu5hph3ret9bg_rp22sh2s8i66pj0stg64o33cth2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

name: ICYMI News
subject: "The best commentary on the principles of government ever written"
body:
I hope you’re having a good day today. You may have heard a lot of talk in the media lately about how our Constitution, as d
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4n2t4984iv86tm1u12t4j00j193kjbim8i0emt8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0stg6aor7chh2bs) [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2za4j1njr6m71bleeo72432ulumfhqu28rv05i5n0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0stg6aor7chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope you’re having a good day today. You may have heard a lot of talk in the media lately about how our Constitution, as designed by the Founding Fathers, is flawed and outdated. It may make you wonder, as it does me: How should defenders of the Constitution respond to these charges? Well, a few early defenders of the Constitution—Alexander Hamilton, John Jay, and James Madison—have given us the guide: The Federalist Papers. These essays were written between October 1787 and August 1788 under the pen name Publius, The Federalist Papers, and were published initially as newspaper editorials intended to explain the merits of the Constitution. Thomas Jefferson described **[The Federalist Papers](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zp0cqtep58367ua648ajq94n80dumsj3tfjm6prg_rp22sh2s8i66pj0stg6aor7chh2bs)** as “the best commentary on the principles of government which ever was written.” There is no better guide to understanding the principles of liberty underlying our Constitution than through the words of the Founders themselves. That’s why I’d like to give you the chance to enroll in Hillsdale’s free online course,**[“The Federalist Papers,”](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zs1r9lp60dhgppkqcodaeoqsgi66v1mvd51ahb6o_rp22sh2s8i66pj0stg6aor7chh2bs)** today. Taught by Hillsdale College’s politics faculty, this ten-lecture course explores the major themes of this classic work of American politics, such as the problem of majority faction, the importance of separation of powers, the nature of the three branches of government, and the argument concerning the Bill of Rights. Thanks for reading my email, and I hope you’ll activate your free enrollment in **[“The Federalist Papers”](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zk4pq2kue7lli3at863fciv25hchfqdknp5m1lk0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0stg6aor7chh2bs)** today. [Activate your free course now »](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zcnbtpf6kbq1q8ck55r4gt50ugjn244spkfs0kp0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0stg6aor7chh2bs) Warm regards,Kyle Murnen, ’09Director of Online LearningHillsdale College
* * *

## What students are saying
"Hillsdale College's online offerings have deepened my education and enriched my life." **\- Fred D.** "Extraordinary in their simplicity and so fulfilling in their content. Thank you for creating this avenue to knowledge." **\- John C.** [Activate your free course now »](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3am4l79fb4ib1d9osoie4gav85dqqo975qm8sd0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0stg6aor7chh2bs)
---

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[Click here to change your subscription preferences](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4j39lb7mkk1nliinte9km6g09rhoem9p038pg1o_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9jle8r7ccjkm1on9dtjmppq9dhkumqb7d9neppqcdtlmuju1df34kqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr69bls2on2s3isujqact4moqfbd5jmkrncst66uqrf8pnm9qrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb0sbkmuprf972u9hf8sb56kpr6odlmhj3cdr6c3grcoj2c2q36cthmcqj9dbgmppnas5hmao7cs9l6sp238h1e8he4933cpgeeo35cdjm8oh5u)

name: GOP Presidential
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
[View this message in your browser](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjqj6kkanot9iffu3eu3dv99e2l75l4hj52qa1n0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0stg6eob2c3h238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqedtge1p7adjkm4qj7cbkmgor79hnmmrq8cjm62qb6t9nkjhf4onksdir6olicgrm6pb6cdjreohimhqn0odi6hhmaob4edp78c34ehj7apr265pr1puie1p68dhgm9j74t1hepge1d3563gbacb4spj6cc3n6kqjfdj7coqm1cr4cuobapbi4no)
This sponsored message from GOP Presidential is on behalf of Hillsdale College
| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z7dih7pbso0cis5135st9s1gmlh122gr7r349mdo_rp22sh2s8i66pj0stg6eob2c3h2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow American, Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid. While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law. Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.” By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly--plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun. That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.” ** Through** “Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** ** ** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.** Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because... Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3dn50o9va5n8k5ol2p637m854cqdjk2j7on82s0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0stg6eob2c3h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below: [_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za4p5ft1kppfo1sigtcfhjl409kai4uko75jco6o_rp22sh2s8i66pj0stg6eob2c3h2bs) Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: American Defense News
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
As you know, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways.
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3fpdk4u9fsj8mlgvrj3s0910jahs2eu367ct4to_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf99jkgqracjkmoq37c9l6cqj7djl6eqjetjjkorrbdt469r31d5jekrq9onicbq32ojl6cqn4cjj6moecp776oor3djhecpm9p32cjjrbdjimeqj2pdkepq60tpgcv970sj2cpob4pjgsipm6o3im1j72tpjcjjr5cb66aob4pj0s2qm6o70mkoj3d9hmlp238h1e8he4933cpgeeo34s9i69oh5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z8hcnl5m7jsmn4titcp8slftjpa5nppmsjk4dfmo_rp22sh2s8i66pj0stg69oj4cjh2bs) [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsa6f3dscjjapqv5aioj68gp72ja4f3op33t02to_rp22sh2s8i66pj0stg69oj4cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, **** As you know, World War II is the greatest armed conflict in human history, encompassing global fighting in unprecedented ways. **** And one way to honor the brave soldiers who fought in World War II is to study the conflict itself—its causes, how it was fought, and its implications on the present day. **** To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course about the war, “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the war’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. **** I hope you find this course as important and fascinating as I do. The strength and bravery of American soldiers during one of the darkest times in human history stands as one of the great moments in our nation’s proud history. It’s a history we must learn, cherish, and share. **** **You can access your free online course, “Second World Wars,” now using this secure link:** **[https://online.hillsdale.edu/landing/the-second-world-wars](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2jlk22j4vvmugkkqjm9lmlh1lat9qcfc08d67r0_rp22sh2s8i66pj0stg69oj4cjh2bs)** Warm regards,
Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College |
#
---

Hello,
After he was stricken with COVID-19 last year, Chuck Grassley’s 27-year streak of 8,927 consecutive votes came to an end. But when you look at what many of those 8,927 votes were... it kinda makes you wish he would have been absent more often.
For over 40 years in the Senate, Chuck Grassley has voted against expanding access to health care, against combatting the world’s climate crisis, against getting money out of politics, and against even the most common sense firearm responsibility issues supported by our police and members of his own party.
Grassley has taken millions from corporate PACs and special interests, including Wall Street, Big Pharma and insurance companies, and the NRA. It should be no surprise that he remains deaf to Iowa but a good listener of billionaires and their lobbyists.
**I’m running for Senate against Chuck Grassley because after a lifetime in elected office, it’s time Iowans had someone actually representing them. You won’t find me taking money from corporate PACs.**
Control of the Senate is on the line here in Iowa, so you know Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are going to come after me with millions of dollars of false TV ads. If we’re going to take on Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and expand our Democratic majority in the Senate, I need grassroots donors like you to chip in now and become a Founding Donor to my campaign. Give me the tools so I can fight back.
[**Please, can you chip in $5, $25, or whatever you can afford now to become a Founding Donor and help me defeat Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and defend our Democratic majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39351442/319472750/-42398318?refcode=em20211205am-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYTNjMDBhNi1kMzU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CPUUHk78lgP2vQesvKBR4IMeM4F5l-fEcynIFvxAr4g=)

clean_body: Hello, After he was stricken with COVID-19 last year, Chuck Grassley’s 27-year streak of 8,927 consecutive votes came to an end. But when you look at what many of those 8,927 votes were... it kinda makes you wish he would have been absent more often. For over 40 years in the Senate, Chuck Grassley has voted against expanding access to health care, against combatting the world’s climate crisis, against getting money out of politics, and against even the most common sense firearm responsibility issues supported by our police and members of his own party. Grassley has taken millions from corporate PACs and special interests, including Wall Street, Big Pharma and insurance companies, and the NRA. It should be no surprise that he remains deaf to Iowa but a good listener of billionaires and their lobbyists. I’m running for Senate against Chuck Grassley because after a lifetime in elected office, it’s time Iowans had someone actually representing them. You won’t find me taking money from corporate PACs. Control of the Senate is on the line here in Iowa, so you know Mitch McConnell and his Super PACs are going to come after me with millions of dollars of false TV ads. If we’re going to take on Chuck Grassley, turn Iowa blue, and expand our Democratic majority in the Senate, I need grassroots donors like you to chip in now and become a Founding Donor to my campaign. Give me the tools so I can fight back. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = We’re running our campaign the right way, but I’m counting on the support of people like you if we’re going to come out victorious. Thank you for your support, Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.) Paid for by Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc Michael Franken for Iowa, Inc PO Box 13401 Des Moines, IA 50310 United States

| | Folks, Elaine and her Democratic House colleagues have been working diligently all year to pass legislation in line with your priorities. We have them to thank for passing President Joe Biden’s Build Back Better Act (BBBA) and the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act. The latter will go a long way towards fixing our crumbling roads and bridges while creating good-paying jobs and laying the foundation for a green economy. We’re meeting with Elaine next week to discuss our campaign strategy as we head into the election year -- and, now that the BBBA and infrastructure deal have passed, she wants to know: [**What’s next on your priority list for House Democrats?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39351571/319472934/376237882?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTNjMDBhNi1kMzU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aUPAaM6ZsEIIzUfVp49z70rRIT24zPlOS_-ybcQWOFE=&emci=81474259-7e53-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=453c00a6-d355-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=7932963) | | | [Take the Survey »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39351572/319472936/376237882?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDA3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTNjMDBhNi1kMzU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aUPAaM6ZsEIIzUfVp49z70rRIT24zPlOS_-ybcQWOFE=&emci=81474259-7e53-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=453c00a6-d355-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=7932963)

name: Gabby Seay
subject: FWD: Did you hear the news?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY
body:
Peter, did you see the announcement Letitia sent yesterday?
---
This is just the beginning of her historic campaign for governor of New York, and we're off to an incredible start – but this is a marathon, not a sprint, and we need fearless fighters like you with us every step of the way if we're going to make it to the finish line.
I'm meeting with Letitia soon, and I don't want to bring her the bad news that we're still falling short of tonight’s $10,000 goal. So please, if you believe that everyday, hardworking New Yorkers, from Manhattan to Niagara Falls, deserve to be protected from the corruption and greed of the powerful and wealthy, **make a donation before 11:59 p.m. to help us elect Letitia James as our next governor.**
Here's the best link to give: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/letitia-james-email-1](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39352525/319476843/-256834629?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk213-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTZmYjI1OC1kNDU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SYEm3oP3nfYFA_20CSQvamHrJfwoShnV4pZiIxJrqYY=)**
Thank you so much for coming through at this crucial moment.
Gabby Seay
Campaign Manager
Team James

From: **Letitia James**
Date: Fri, Dec 3, 2021
Subject: I have the courage and passion
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39352526/319476844/-256834629?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk213-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTZmYjI1OC1kNDU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SYEm3oP3nfYFA_20CSQvamHrJfwoShnV4pZiIxJrqYY=)
Did you see the news, Peter?
**FIRST:** I was elected attorney general of New York where I’ve fought tirelessly to defend the vulnerable. As your attorney general, I’ve worked hard to hold the country's most powerful and wealthy – including Donald Trump and the gun lobby – accountable.
**THEN:** I launched my campaign for governor at the end of October. I’m running because New York needs real, impactful change right now, and _I have the courage, the passion, and the record of experience to get things done._
**NOW:** I need a dedicated grassroots team behind me if I’m going to reach the finish line. I have so much more fight left in me, but winning this race will be impossible without your help.
I cannot afford to lose any momentum. I have big plans to defend New York from the threats of climate change, racial and economic inequality, and the interests of the ultrawealthy and powerful, but I need your help. **[Peter, will you donate $5 right now to help me fight for powerless and vulnerable New Yorkers all over this great state? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39352527/319476845/-256834629?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk213-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMTZmYjI1OC1kNDU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SYEm3oP3nfYFA_20CSQvamHrJfwoShnV4pZiIxJrqYY=)**

Thanks for being a part of this historic team,

Letitia James
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Peter,

The truth is that President Joe Biden and Democrats are doing everything they can to help everyday people.

Democrats passed the bipartisan infrastructure bill, our country saw the lowest number of new unemployment claims in nearly 20 months, and Joe Biden helped get millions of shots into the arms of everyone over the age of 5 years old to fight back against the pandemic.

We’re seeing a strong economic recovery from the last year of the pandemic, and Democrats should get credit for the work they’ve done to get us back on track and the plans they are proposing for our country’s future.

But we’re not going to be able to continue the strong progress we’ve seen in the last year if we lose control of the Senate in 2022. **Everything is on the line, from President Biden’s popular Build Back Better plan to Federal Court nominations to improving on things like our healthcare.**

**[We need to double down on our efforts to protect the Senate Majority, and that starts in Wisconsin. clean_body: We’re not going to be able to continue the strong progress we’ve seen in the last year if we lose control of the Senate in 2022. | | = Peter, The truth is that President Joe Biden and Democrats are doing everything they can to help everyday people. Democrats passed the bipartisan infrastructure bill, our country saw the lowest number of new unemployment claims in nearly 20 months, and Joe Biden helped get millions of shots into the arms of everyone over the age of 5 years old to fight back against the pandemic. We’re seeing a strong economic recovery from the last year of the pandemic, and Democrats should get credit for the work they’ve done to get us back on track and the plans they are proposing for our country’s future. But we’re not going to be able to continue the strong progress we’ve seen in the last year if we lose control of the Senate in 2022. Everything is on the line, from President Biden’s popular Build Back Better plan to Federal Court nominations to improving on things like our healthcare. = = Thank you, Team Lasry ** | | We need to re-think how our economy works, and we need new voices in Washington. Alex Lasry has a fresh perspective and record of actually getting things done. We can beat Ron Johnson by building a grassroots coalition, but it will take all of us. Will you pitch in any amount to help us keep the Senate Majority and defeat Ron Johnson? = Paid for by Lasry for Wisconsin Stay connected with Alex's campaign to defeat Ron Johnson: Lasry for Wisconsin P.O. name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: 📎 photo
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
I love this photo for many reasons...
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39356019/319493439/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk465-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Yzc1NGRiOC1kYzU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tz2ZEz2YoOPI8qPoDcfCIZvlzMIjk8suiGiSDK6Jis0=)
Hi Peter: I want to share an old photo with you. This is my grandma, Helen Finkenauer, with my dad, Jerry, who was just a baby then. **This photo always brings a smile to my face, but it also reminds me of a big issue – one that's at the forefront of my mind every day that I'm on the campaign trail for our race to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley (R-IA).**
You see, back in 1958, my grandfather was able to come home from the war and find a job – and not just any job. A very good paying _union _job. He was able to make a living for his family of four, with money left over to get a chance to _enjoy _life. Not only that, he and Grandma had a sense of security knowing a pension and retirement would be there for them in the future.
**It's nice to get nostalgic about old photos, but with that nostalgia comes an important realization: This picture wouldn't exist if my grandpa didn't have the means, provided by his union job, to purchase a camera.**
I'm running for Iowa's Senate seat to defeat Sen. Chuck Grassley because our state and country have gone through too many years of seeing middle and working class jobs decimated. There's no way in hell I'm going to sit on the sidelines while billionaires increase their profits as unions get weaker.
You see, working families are _my _family. That little kid you see in the photo above went on to become a union pipefitter-welder, and it was that good job that allowed our family to have a solid quality of life when I was growing up. **We need a senator who will fight for legislation that bolsters the middle class. Sen. Grassley isn't that guy. But my public service has always – _always _– been about the fight for working families like mine. **
**[I'll keep this simple: If you believe that we need people in the Senate who will fight for our working families, and that we need to flip Iowa blue to protect our Senate majority – then I need you with me. Please, can you donate $5 to my campaign right here and now? In a race like this, every dollar counts.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39356021/319493440/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk465-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Yzc1NGRiOC1kYzU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tz2ZEz2YoOPI8qPoDcfCIZvlzMIjk8suiGiSDK6Jis0=)**
Thank you for your support. I'm so grateful to have you on my team.

Abby
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39356023/319493442/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk465-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4Yzc1NGRiOC1kYzU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Tz2ZEz2YoOPI8qPoDcfCIZvlzMIjk8suiGiSDK6Jis0=)

Right now, we're at a crossroads in Ohio. We have big plans to flip Ohio's open Senate seat, take back the governor's office, and elect Democrats up and down the ballot. But if we're going to be successful, we need to build a grassroots team strong enough to win.

We're fighting every day to ensure hardworking Ohioans have leaders they can rely on. Leaders who will fight to make healthcare more affordable, rebuild our economy, invest in the middle class, and so much more.

name: Dr. Oz
subject: I refuse to be led by such an incompetent leader any longer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Doctor Oz For Senate
body:
Biden failed, and left us with so little.

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58936868:JJUrVQENJ:m:1:3253819041:0CC8A519FC5F8F41C586FEBF776B783E:r)
---

Fellow Americans,

_The collapse and carnage that is unfolding abroad and at our border is a true glimpse into the unmitigated disaster of Joe Biden and his administration._

I was heartbroken and disgusted by the Biden administration's reckless departure from Afghanistan that left Americans behind. Our people deserve better. _[**Join my campaign to bring back strong leadership to America.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58936868:JJUrVQENJ:m:1:3253819041:0CC8A519FC5F8F41C586FEBF776B783E:r)_

As a medical student at the Philadelphia VA hospital where I worked with veterans, I witnessed first-hand the sacrifices made by our men and women in uniform.

While I supported leaving Afghanistan, I believe President Biden displayed an utter dereliction of duty by surrendering to the Taliban. _The tragedy that ensued will weigh on our shoulders for years to come._

On the homefront, Biden has failed us as well: the surge of undocumented migrants crossing the Border has not slowed down since he has taken office. _**[Pitch in here to secure our border and put Americans first once again.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58936868:JJUrVQENJ:m:1:3253819041:0CC8A519FC5F8F41C586FEBF776B783E:r)**_

If left unchecked, this will not only become an economic disaster but a complete humanitarian catastrophe. _**[Americans can not endure another catastrophe of this magnitude.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58936868:JJUrVQENJ:m:1:3253819041:0CC8A519FC5F8F41C586FEBF776B783E:r)**_

**As Commander in Chief of the United States, Joe Biden has failed us.

Such a display of weakness on the world stage would not have happened under President Trump's leadership.**

I refuse to be led by such an incompetent leader any longer. His failures go far beyond political partisanship. Joe Biden's sickening actions should outrage every patriotic American. The U.S. is supposed to be a defender of democracy and a protector of its allies.

This administration is out of touch with the American people -- and we are sick of it.

As Pennsylvania's Senator, I will always put the people FIRST.

Thank You,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58936868:JJUrVQENJ:m:1:3253819041:0CC8A519FC5F8F41C586FEBF776B783E:r)
Dr. Oz

* * *
_Dr. Oz is a Conservative running for U.S. Senate to reignite our divine spark, fight for freedom and return the power to you.**[Donate $25 today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58936869:JJUrVQENJ:m:1:3253819041:0CC8A519FC5F8F41C586FEBF776B783E:r)** to ensure that he has the support he needs to become Pennsylvania's next Senator._
* * *

I was heartbroken and disgusted by the Biden administration's reckless departure from Afghanistan that left Americans behind. Our people deserve better. As a medical student at the Philadelphia VA hospital where I worked with veterans, I witnessed first-hand the sacrifices made by our men and women in uniform. While I supported leaving Afghanistan, I believe President Biden displayed an utter dereliction of duty by surrendering to the Taliban. The tragedy that ensued will weigh on our shoulders for years to come. On the homefront, Biden has failed us as well: the surge of undocumented migrants crossing the Border has not slowed down since he has taken office. If left unchecked, this will not only become an economic disaster but a complete humanitarian catastrophe. As Commander in Chief of the United States, Joe Biden has failed us. Such a display of weakness on the world stage would not have happened under President Trump's leadership. I refuse to be led by such an incompetent leader any longer. His failures go far beyond political partisanship. Joe Biden's sickening actions should outrage every patriotic American. The U.S. is supposed to be a defender of democracy and a protector of its allies. This administration is out of touch with the American people -- and we are sick of it. As Pennsylvania's Senator, I will always put the people FIRST. Thank You, Dr. Oz Dr. Oz is a Conservative running for U.S. Senate to reignite our divine spark, fight for freedom and return the power to you. to ensure that he has the support he needs to become Pennsylvania's next Senator. | Paid for by Doctor Oz For Senate If you would like to donate by mail, Our mailing address is: Doctor Oz For Senate 2771 Philmont Ave Huntingdon Valley, PA 19006 This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com You were added to the system March 29, 2021. body:
Calling All Patriots: look inside!

**The Trump Patriot movement is unstoppable**. From Florida to California, millions of freedom-loving Americans have shown their support for President Trump. But only the most dedicated are invited to join the 1776 Donor Club.

_Congratulations, you’re one of them!_

[**To join, all you have to do is chip in $17.76 to help freedom loving patriots across the nation fight back against the Left’s attacks.**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-309pj-1ntl5-4qqlpo5/)

245 years ago our Founding Fathers declared independence and embarked on the greatest experiment in history. They laid the plans for a new nation built on the ideals of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness.

_**But now those freedoms are under attack. And the Radical Left will not stop until they have dismantled this great nation from the inside out.**_

That’s why we’re asking top patriots, like yourself, to fight the good fight and keep America free from Pelosi’s socialist agenda. We will not win this fight alone....

[**ACCEPT INVITATION**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-309pj-1ntl6-4qqlpo6/)

Patriot, Donald Trump and House Conservatives are watching what you do in this moment: You can ignore this email and give Nancy Pelosi more power in Congress _OR_[**you can RUSH your $17.76 gift to join an elite group of America First patriots and leave Nancy Pelosi shaking in her boots!**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-309pj-1ntl7-4qqlpo7/)

[**CHIP IN $17.76**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-309pj-1ntl8-4qqlpo8/)

America’s Founders fought for our independence from big government. Now you’ve got the chance to do the same. [**Chip in $17.76 ASAP!**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-309pj-1ntl9-4qqlpo9/)

Thank you,

1776 Donor Club

P.S. There are millions of other Trump Patriots who would happily join the 1776 Donor Club. We chose YOU! [**Answer the call**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-309pj-1ntla-4qqlpo9/) or we will have to select the next conservative on our list...

___________________________________________
**
[](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-309pj-1ntlb-4qqlpo0/)

ATTN TRUMP PATRIOTS: TRUMP’S 2024 RUN HINGES ON FLIPPING 5 SEATS RED!**

Pelosi’s raising MILLIONS and spending MILLIONS MORE attacking freedom-loving patriots across the nation. She’s determined to ERASE Trump’s legacy and OBLITERATE his allies in Congress... _because she knows if we TAKE BACK THE HOUSE, Trump might run for PRESIDENT!_

We’re facing an uphill battle. We need each and every patriot who sees this to join the fight. If we fall even a dollar short, we will lose the House to Pelosi FOREVER. [**Can we count on you to step up?**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-309pj-1ntlc-4qqlpo1/)

[**DONATE**](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-309pj-1ntld-4qqlpo2/)

Thank you for your continued support and thank you for being a dedicated member of our team.****
****

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: Happy Holidays
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
With love from my family to yours
#

Friend,
Before the month gets away from us, I want to take a moment to wish you and your family a very happy and safe holiday season.
This time of year reminds us of what matters most, and I want you to know that I'm deeply grateful for you and every person on our team.
Without you, none of the work we do would be possible. I mean that.
So no matter what you're celebrating, I hope that your holiday season is filled with all of the love and light in the world.
With love from my family to yours,
Malcolm Kenyatta

My name is Sarah. I'm reaching out on behalf of Republican HQ with one quick research question.

name: Val Demings
subject: Friend, I can defeat Marco Rubio
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
Winning in Florida would virtually guarantee a Democratic Senate majority
| | |
---
**Friend – I can defeat Marco Rubio.**

The right to vote is fundamental to our democracy, friend. That’s why House Democrats voted this summer to pass the John Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act, which would restore and reaffirm crucial elements of the 1965 Voting Rights Act.**It should come as no surprise that Paul Gosar voted against this bill that would ensure voting rights for all Americans.**

This crucial legislation would make voting more accessible for millions of Americans, including right here in Arizona — and Gosar knows that would hurt his re-election prospects. **We must send him a strong message that despite his insistence on working against the foundation of our democracy, there is real support for voting rights legislation.**

[_**Please sign my petition now to show Paul Gosar that voting rights are a key issue for American voters.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39359867/319510764/-1044211175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83Nzc4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMWJhNGMzYS1lNjU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9OFtyIBiYVNCA-9qcp3eSSpnpfx9t5Ilhq6p3nXWQ7g=&emci=5a29165a-7354-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=f1ba4c3a-e655-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=29183203)

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: a personal request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
| | |

I have to be direct, I’m worried. We finally have a Democrat in the White House and control of the Senate -- with that comes an opportunity to make progress for American families. But I’m worried because all that progress depends on us holding on to our slim one-vote Democratic Senate majority. Senate control hinges on New Hampshire, where Maggie Hassan is defending a seat she won by just 1,017 votes. Republican extremists have already spent almost $6 MILLION attacking Maggie this year, and a new poll out this week shows New Hampshire **tied.** **That’s why I’m asking for your help right now:[Will you rush $5 or more to give Maggie the resources she needs to win and keep the Senate blue? I’m counting on you to come through before midnight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39360085/319511472/-913685435?refcode=e20211205_keg&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNTZhZTJmYy1lNjU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V-XWFseXu4BTC-rhCSLsMFpZAMOjb5kxFoisxsQ0pe8=)** New Hampshire is a solid swing state, and all eyes are going to be glued to Maggie’s race. **Don’t get me wrong: this race is 100% winnable, but it’s going to be extremely expensive and incredibly close.** Donating this far from Election Day may not seem like it makes a difference -- like your $5 is a drop in the bucket for a race that will cost tens of millions of dollars. # Stop the stranglehold on U.S. energy
---
The United States Strategic Petroleum Reserves is to be used in an emergency only, not because of incompetence. Yet last week, the Biden Administration authorized the use of 50 million barrels of oil from the strategic reserve, while calling for increased costs for drilling on American public lands. And rather than supporting domestic producers, Biden continues to look to OPEC and Russia for supply, further weakening American by leaving us vulnerable to our enemies.
Colorado is an energy producing state that can help fuel America by heating our homes, lowering the price of gas, and employing thousands of workers. It's estimated that Biden's insipid action of ending new federal lands leases will cost Colorado 18,000 jobs and $108 million in state revenue.
We are more dependent on foreign energy, our fuel prices are still skyrocketing, we are losing jobs and revenue, and we are tapping our strategic reserve. This is insanity and it has to stop.
As your next U.S. Senator, I will work to formulate a balanced energy policy, one that allows U.S producers to help us regain energy independence, while seeking ways to keep our environment clean and our economy strong.
Please help me by giving what you can to our cause. Together, we can stop the insanity in Washington and restore strength to Colorado and our nation. Stand with me today.
Kindly,

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39365284/319517535/715298156?refcode=smp-em-header&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDI0MTBjNy1lYzU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S8JADUOimMFwfhYZBCBQjq1ZPz4ic7fsqcf7_QQjvOI=)
Friends — November was an incredibly busy month for Democrats. We passed the _Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act_ — the largest single infrastructure investment in American history. **But we’re just getting started, friend!** We’ve got a lot going on in December as we continue our efforts to deliver for the people and lay the groundwork to defend our majority in the 2022 midterms. And along the way, we want everyone on this team weighing in. [_**Will you take a moment to share which issues are most important to you and your family? You can click here to take our two-minute survey.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39365285/319517536/149586362?refcode=AU_SMP_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20211205_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDI0MTBjNy1lYzU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S8JADUOimMFwfhYZBCBQjq1ZPz4ic7fsqcf7_QQjvOI=&emci=6bc8089c-764c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=e02410c7-ec55-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=16186895) | [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39365286/319517537/149586362?refcode=AU_SMP_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20211205_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDI0MTBjNy1lYzU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S8JADUOimMFwfhYZBCBQjq1ZPz4ic7fsqcf7_QQjvOI=&emci=6bc8089c-764c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=e02410c7-ec55-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=16186895)
---
From Nevada to New Hampshire and every state in between, we’re not exaggerating when we say the fate of the Senate is on the line.
Keeping Democratic control of the Senate is vital to the Biden administration’s success — because if Mitch McConnell regains control, you can bet he’ll block our progress every step of the way.
So as we continue working hard to defend and expand our Democratic majority and making progress on important progressive issues, it’s crucial that we hear what’s on your mind.
[_**Please fill out our December Priorities Survey to be a part of our fundraising and mobilization strategy — your feedback is so important.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39365288/319517538/149586362?refcode=AU_SMP_EG_GEN_SUR_AC_20211205_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMDI0MTBjNy1lYzU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S8JADUOimMFwfhYZBCBQjq1ZPz4ic7fsqcf7_QQjvOI=&emci=6bc8089c-764c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8&emdi=e02410c7-ec55-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=16186895)

| | Hey everyone, [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39366613/319519757/362153935?refcode=2021-12-05-birthday&recurring=0&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=7870c329-ee55-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODcwYzMyOS1lZTU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EVajNdqnTZmXgv5N8a28Qo559mVXKCP7FwGQpRVR7Tg=)Chris here. For those of you whom I've not yet met, I'm Andrea's husband. **For starters, THANK YOU so much for all you've done so far for Andrea as we launch this huge new chapter in our lives. And thank you for all that you're going to do for her over the next year.** Andrea's got this amazing willpower and work ethic when it comes to making the world a better place for the next generation. I've seen it with my own eyes, when she's staying up late putting the pieces together on a tough policy problem, burning up the phone lines organizing advocates, or making the case to her legislative colleagues to win support for an important bill. **[Tomorrow's her birthday—will you help make it a great one by chipping in to her campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39366615/319519758/362153935?refcode=2021-12-05-birthday&recurring=0&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=7870c329-ee55-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODcwYzMyOS1lZTU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EVajNdqnTZmXgv5N8a28Qo559mVXKCP7FwGQpRVR7Tg=)** She fights so hard for everyone else and always puts others first. It's really great to see so many friends, family, neighbors, colleagues, and brand-new supporters step up to this great challenge. I know it'll mean the world to her if folks chip in and make this birthday special. [Donate Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39366617/319519759/362153935?refcode=2021-12-05-birthday&recurring=0&amount=6&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=7870c329-ee55-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODcwYzMyOS1lZTU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EVajNdqnTZmXgv5N8a28Qo559mVXKCP7FwGQpRVR7Tg=) Thanks again. clean_body: | | | Hey everyone, here. For those of you whom I've not yet met, I'm Andrea's husband. For starters, THANK YOU so much for all you've done so far for Andrea as we launch this huge new chapter in our lives. And thank you for all that you're going to do for her over the next year. Andrea's got this amazing willpower and work ethic when it comes to making the world a better place for the next generation. I've seen it with my own eyes, when she's staying up late putting the pieces together on a tough policy problem, burning up the phone lines organizing advocates, or making the case to her legislative colleagues to win support for an important bill. = She fights so hard for everyone else and always puts others first. It's really great to see so many friends, family, neighbors, colleagues, and brand-new supporters step up to this great challenge. I know it'll mean the world to her if folks chip in and make this birthday special. = Thanks again. It means a lot. body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39369734/319522986/683353327?refcode=20211205_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmRhMDlkYS1mNDU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C8nSLyhXViC8q7067CwF95Db50MI6v7qxDu4EZkjRSI=) Friend, this will be quick – and I really need your help: 1\. We knew Georgia was going to be a critical battleground – _again_ – but now, POLITICO reports that our race will decide which party controls the Senate. 2\. Republicans have made me their top target for next year's critical elections, and they're already outspending us on misleading attack ads in order to smear my record and turn Georgia red. 3\. Our grassroots campaign is **falling****$17,871****short** of what we need to fight back, hit our midnight fundraising goal and win this race. **Unless we close this budget gap by midnight, the GOP's attacks could leave a major mark.** **We cannot hand Georgia – and our critical Senate majority – back to Mitch McConnell and the GOP when everything from our voting rights to health care is under attack.** But according to analysts at _The Washington Post_ , that's exactly what could happen if we lose this battleground race. **Please, friend, I'm counting on you. With time running out before our critical midnight deadline, I'm asking you to give every dollar you can spare right now: ** [**Will you split a donation between me and Seth Moulton before 11:59 p.m. tonight to hit our goal, win in Georgia and take back the Senate for Democrats?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39369735/319522987/683353327?refcode=20211205_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyZmRhMDlkYS1mNDU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C8nSLyhXViC8q7067CwF95Db50MI6v7qxDu4EZkjRSI=) We're so close, friend – thank you. — Raphael Warnock

name: Rand Paul
subject: Dr. Fauci called me out personally for criticizing his absolute failures
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
**It 's time to FIRE FAUCI!** **[Chip in if you agree! >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58937264:6svjKQENO:m:1:3253819041:CE4A26DC574C453FE13E339C1DB2D690:r)** __ [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58937264:6svjKQENO:m:1:3253819041:CE4A26DC574C453FE13E339C1DB2D690:r) | |
---
Peter, Fauci is absolutely out of control.

He's lied about COVID from the very beginning. He lied about masks. He lied about funding gain of function research.

_Now, he's lying about ME._

This weekend, Dr. Fauci called me out personally for criticizing his absolute failures. He said that anyone criticizing him is really attacking science. He told an adoring anchor that anyone who opposes him is _ "really criticizing science because I represent science."_

The absolute hubris is almost too much to take - and it's yet another reason it's time to show Fauci the door.
__
[**I AGREE: FIRE FAUCI >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58937264:6svjKQENO:m:1:3253819041:CE4A26DC574C453FE13E339C1DB2D690:r)
__
Peter, it's truly astounding and alarming that a public health bureaucrat would even think to claim such a thing.

_" I represent science."_

It's especially insane to hear that from someone who has worked so hard to ignore the science.
__
* He won't acknowledge natural immunity.
* He wants kids masked and vaccinated despite the evidence that suggests both could be more harmful to them than the actual virus.
* He continues to move the goalposts HE set for "progress" on the virus.

__
It's clear all the power has gotten to his head and it's about time we send him home.

**If you 're with me and you want to FIRE FAUCI, I hope you'll chip in now: [https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-3292728/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58937264:6svjKQENO:m:1:3253819041:CE4A26DC574C453FE13E339C1DB2D690:r)**

I know my effort to dismiss Fauci is clearly getting to him - that's why he's spewing this nonsense on TV! But I have to keep up the fight against the Fauci-loving bureaucracy if we truly want to see this man fired.

Please, chip in what you can to join the fight.
__
[**FIRE FAUCI: $100**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58937264:6svjKQENO:m:1:3253819041:CE4A26DC574C453FE13E339C1DB2D690:r)
[**FIRE FAUCI: $75**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58937264:6svjKQENO:m:1:3253819041:CE4A26DC574C453FE13E339C1DB2D690:r)
[**FIRE FAUCI: $50**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58937264:6svjKQENO:m:1:3253819041:CE4A26DC574C453FE13E339C1DB2D690:r)
[**FIRE FAUCI: $35**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58937264:6svjKQENO:m:1:3253819041:CE4A26DC574C453FE13E339C1DB2D690:r)
In Liberty,
Rand Paul
__

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39370460/319526706/390307162?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmE5NGQwYy1mODU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GsP_-efXhYWu8dDTFSETFe61RUVEPwUaKx8SfZ7zTQk=)
Friend,

Before we launched this campaign, a lot of political “experts” questioned why I'd take on a five-term incumbent like Doug LaMalfa. They said this district is too red and it was a bad idea.

**[I disagree, and this isn't the first time I've overcome being written off by naysayers. If you want to help me prove them wrong, chip in $3 to send a message that we have what it takes to win this district.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39370461/319526707/-209993060?refcode=em-12.5.21-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmE5NGQwYy1mODU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GsP_-efXhYWu8dDTFSETFe61RUVEPwUaKx8SfZ7zTQk=)**
| **[Contribute »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39370462/319526708/-209993060?refcode=em-12.5.21-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmE5NGQwYy1mODU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GsP_-efXhYWu8dDTFSETFe61RUVEPwUaKx8SfZ7zTQk=)**
---

Here's what we're focused on:

Redistricting is almost done which means we're pretty close to finding out what our new district lines in CA-01 will look like. With the first draft maps showing a tilt toward Democrats, we're certainly getting new lines and voters.

**Those new lines will make LaMalfa _very_ uncomfortable.** He'll have to talk to voters who haven't heard from him and I bet he'll have a real tough time explaining why he's covering for Trump and making excuses for the Jan. 6th insurrectionists, instead of prioritizing our working families, farmers, and small businesses in Congress.

**We can reach these voters before LaMalfa.** We have a better platform for stopping the wildfires, supporting our farmers and small businesses, raising wages for working people, and ensuring the North State way of life isn't out of reach for future generations.

**I KNOW we can win this race, and I can tell you there are a ton of folks in this community who agree. I'm talking to them every day, but I can't reach everyone, which is why I'm asking for your help:**

**[Will you chip in $3 toward my end-of-week goal? I'm coming up $8,921 short of where we need to be before 11:59 pm tonight. Anything you give goes straight toward reaching more voters and giving LaMalfa the fight of his political career>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39370463/319526709/-209993060?refcode=em-12.5.21-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmE5NGQwYy1mODU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GsP_-efXhYWu8dDTFSETFe61RUVEPwUaKx8SfZ7zTQk=)**

Thanks,

Max
Veteran and Democrat for Congress

**[Contribute »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39370464/319526710/-209993060?refcode=em-12.5.21-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmE5NGQwYy1mODU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GsP_-efXhYWu8dDTFSETFe61RUVEPwUaKx8SfZ7zTQk=)**

Team, I wanted to drop you a quick update on where our campaign is right now. We always want to be transparent, so I’ll tell you the truth: We’re expecting a bit of a slump in fundraising until the end of the year that could force us to roll back on critical campaign investments just as the race ramps up in January. During this time of year, folks are heading offline and spending extra time with their loved ones. Campaigns and politics are often the last things on their minds. But as I look over our fundraising numbers this quarter, I’m worried we might be heading into 2022 behind where we need to be. The last thing I want to do is scale back our campaign, but these months are notoriously slow for grassroots campaigns like ours that reject money from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists. Once we enter January we’ll be in a full-on sprint to Election Day 2022, and so will Michael’s opponents; your support today makes a huge difference. You see, the National GOP could pour millions of the $75 million they’ve raised so far this year into this race to take back the Senate and undo the progress Michael and Democrats have made this year. **So I’m humbly asking for your help right now: Will you pitch in just $10 today before you log off for the weekend? name: Team Holly
subject: November from the campaign trail
body:
https://www.everyaction.com/ [https://www.everyaction.com/]
Dear Peter,
I'm Holly McCormack and today I'm announcing my candidacy against Marjorie Taylor Greene for Georgia's 14th Congressional District. We are kicking off our campaign today by reaching out to you because we need your support. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc]
I am a mother, small businesswoman, and a community activist. I have lived in this District most of my life and the issues our residents are facing are not addressed with conspiracy theories.
Rush a donation today:
$5.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $50.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $10.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $75.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $25.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] $100.00 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vvydox3IxDY [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vvydox3IxDY]Northwest Georgia is currently represented by someone who parachuted into the District just before the election because she thought it would be an easy win. She likes to make noise and fuel hate while ignoring the needs of those who actually live in our District. That is not who we are ! We need someone from our community who knows our struggles and who can stand up for us to get things done in Congress.
We need a leader who has values and empathy for everyone in her District, not just those with the loudest voices. Let's cut through the noise and get to work.
Check out our Website [http://www.hollyforcongress.org/] , Twitter [https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress] , and Facebook [https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/] . We have a tough road ahead of us but with your help we can fire Marjorie. Donate $50 today and help me take Northwest Georgia back. I couldn’t do it without you. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc]
In solidarity,
Holly McCormack
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hfc] Join the #MackPack [http://www.hollyforcongress.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/ [https://www.facebook.com/HollyForCongress/] https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress [https://twitter.com/Holly_4Congress] https://www.instagram.com/hollyforcongress/ [https://www.instagram.com/hollyforcongress/] https://www.hollyforcongress.org [https://www.hollyforcongress.org]

Holly McCormack for Congress
862 Lafayette St
PO Box 1035
Ringgold, GA 30736
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/59b332b4-a44c-ec11-9820-c896653b26c8/ab5293c3-fa55-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYjUyOTNjMy1mYTU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cAAuKO01bOqkHXfT7vUIapPh4WGKH0sXOOhSnmjg51Q=&id=126471745 .

Rush a donation today: $5.00 [] $50.00 [] $10.00 [] $75.00 [] $25.00 [] $100.00 [] [ Georgia is currently represented by someone who parachuted into the District just before the election because she thought it would be an easy win. She likes to make noise and fuel hate while ignoring the needs of those who actually live in our District. That is not who we are ! We need someone from our community who knows our struggles and who can stand up for us to get things done in Congress. We need a leader who has values and empathy for everyone in her District, not just those with the loudest voices. Let's cut through the noise and get to work. Check out our Website [] , Twitter [] , and Facebook [] . We have a tough road ahead of us but with your help we can fire Marjorie. Donate $50 today and help me take Northwest Georgia back. I couldn’t do it without you. [] In solidarity, Holly McCormack DONATE [] Join the #MackPack [] [] [] [] [] Holly McCormack for Congress 862 Lafayette St PO Box 1035 Ringgold, GA 30736 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: Seth Magaziner
subject: Holding Pinterest accountable
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SETH MAGAZINER FOR GOVERNOR
body:
**_The Providence Journal_ : Pinterest to undergo corporate diversity reform to settle suit led by RI General Treasurer**
---
Peter,

After revelations of widespread workplace discrimination and retaliation against women and people of color at internet giant Pinterest, I took action to hold them accountable.

I filed a lawsuit on behalf of the thousands of Rhode Islanders who own shares in Pinterest through the state's pension fund, and I'm thrilled to say we won! This settlement is the first of its kind to embrace diversity goals and it forced Pinterest to make sweeping reforms to the way it hires, trains and supports employees.

Everyone deserves to be treated with respect in their workplace regardless of race, gender or identity. We have to be proactive to ensure workers are treated fairly and companies understand that diversity, equity, and inclusion should be a priority in every boardroom and workplace.

I will continue working as Treasurer to ensure this historic settlement sets a new standard for corporate diversity and inclusion practices nationally. And as Governor of Rhode Island, I will continue working to hold corporations accountable. Your support has allowed me to do this work, and I am very grateful.

[**If you would like to continue to support this work, please consider a contribution to my campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39370839/319529285/1154052794?refcode=em21_211205_Pintst_fnd_gq_act___SM_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211205_Pintst_fnd_gq_act___SM_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYTVmYzI4ZS1mZDU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=X-61li4Z8tV0PdlMfXvGNq-ImUApF3MkW5NyNBykevc=)

Thank you,

Seth

clean_body: The Providence Journal : Pinterest to undergo corporate diversity reform to settle suit led by RI General Treasurer Peter, After revelations of widespread workplace discrimination and retaliation against women and people of color at internet giant Pinterest, I took action to hold them accountable. I filed a lawsuit on behalf of the thousands of Rhode Islanders who own shares in Pinterest through the state's pension fund, and I'm thrilled to say we won! This settlement is the first of its kind to embrace diversity goals and it forced Pinterest to make sweeping reforms to the way it hires, trains and supports employees. Everyone deserves to be treated with respect in their workplace regardless of race, gender or identity. We have to be proactive to ensure workers are treated fairly and companies understand that diversity, equity, and inclusion should be a priority in every boardroom and workplace. I will continue working as Treasurer to ensure this historic settlement sets a new standard for corporate diversity and inclusion practices nationally. And as Governor of Rhode Island, I will continue working to hold corporations accountable. Your support has allowed me to do this work, and I am very grateful. = Thank you, Seth = | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY SETH MAGAZINER FOR GOVERNOR VICTORIA ALMEIDA, TREASURER Seth Magaziner for Governor Victoria Almeida, Treasurer PO Box 303 Providence, RI 02901 United States

body:
Everyone will be watching — the press, our opponents, and our allies as well.
#

Friends —
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a contribution to my campaign. Please give me a chance to explain why this request is so important.
Here’s the truth:
December is an official FEC deadline month. What that means is, when it’s over, we are legally required to report how much money we raised AND the number of donations we received online will also be public.
Everyone will be watching — the press, our opponents, and our allies as well. They all want to know if we are building the kind of grassroots campaign it will take to hold this seat.
So, while it’s early in the month, we can’t afford to start slow. We need the peace of mind that we will reach our goal. And that is why I am asking:
[**Can you please make a $3 contribution to my re-election campaign today? We need a HUGE number of donations before we’re legally required to release our numbers.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-dec21?refcode=em211205-1-subs&t=1&refcode2=1749_6688874_3q58W3&akid=1749%2E6688874%2E3q58W3)
