name: Team Schiff
subject: Donald Trump attacked Adam late last night
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
Derek — Late last night, Donald Trump was at it again in Mar-a-Lago, sending out a blatantly false statement attacking Adam for doing his job and holding Trump accountable. It’s a hodgepodge of the usual denials of Russian help in his election, lies about the insurrection, and false smears, but don’t take it from us. We’ll let you read Trump’s bonkers statement for yourself: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39371454/319532454/-1966934778?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20211205_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTQ5Y2FiYS1mZTU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vGGAEZszUkHsmQ68EScc_DJWawe19mBoZ9I8u9krk40=) This isn’t normal. But it’s the world of politics we live in today. Where a disgraced former president can smear a sitting Congressman, call him an anti-Semitic slur, and label a violent insurrection at the Capitol a “protest.” Here’s what happens after: hundreds of tweets from right-wing whackos on Twitter join Trump in attacking Adam, the statement is shown on Fox News and OAN leading to more attacks, and then there are stories in right-wing tabloids written about Trump’s attack and subsequent tweets. It’s a vicious cycle, and red meat for Trump’s base. He feeds on the bile. But the cost is real: it leads to more threats against Adam. (Which is another thing Trump wants.) Adam is never going to stop holding Donald Trump accountable. Never. No matter what. And that’s why we need to be prepared heading into the 2022 election. **Can you chip in $10 to help Adam fight back against these latest lies and smears from Donald Trump and his misinformation machine?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39371455/319532455/-1966934778?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20211205_PM1_V2_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYTQ5Y2FiYS1mZTU1LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vGGAEZszUkHsmQ68EScc_DJWawe19mBoZ9I8u9krk40=)

clean_body: | Derek — Late last night, Donald Trump was at it again in Mar-a-Lago, sending out a blatantly false statement attacking Adam for doing his job and holding Trump accountable. It’s a hodgepodge of the usual denials of Russian help in his election, lies about the insurrection, and false smears, but don’t take it from us. We’ll let you read Trump’s bonkers statement for yourself: = This isn’t normal. But it’s the world of politics we live in today. Where a disgraced former president can smear a sitting Congressman, call him an anti-Semitic slur, and label a violent insurrection at the Capitol a “protest.” Here’s what happens after: hundreds of tweets from right-wing whackos on Twitter join Trump in attacking Adam, the statement is shown on Fox News and OAN leading to more attacks, and then there are stories in right-wing tabloids written about Trump’s attack and subsequent tweets. It’s a vicious cycle, and red meat for Trump’s base. He feeds on the bile. But the cost is real: it leads to more threats against Adam. (Which is another thing Trump wants.) Adam is never going to stop holding Donald Trump accountable. Never. No matter what. And that’s why we need to be prepared heading into the 2022 election. Can you chip in $10 to help Adam fight back against these latest lies and smears from Donald Trump and his misinformation machine? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thanks for always having Adam’s back. It means the world to us. — Team Schiff Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress Schiff for Congress 150 E. Olive Ave. Suite 208 Burbank, CA 91502 United States

Hey, Peter.
It’s our fourth month on the campaign trail, and things are really starting to come together.
We’ve raised thousands of dollars from grassroots supporters like you, Dr. Martin will finish his 95 County Listening Tour in just a few days, and we’re laying plans to sustain this momentum into the new year.
**But, always remember that Dr. Martin’s #1 priority is staying in tune with Tennesseans like you — what you care about, what keeps you up at night, and what keeps you going.**
With 2022 just around the corner, we want to know what you’re most looking forward to in the new year (other than electing a new governor for ALL Tennesseans, because we’re all on board for that one!). body:

| | |

**[I'll enter 2022 with whatever I raise in the next few hours, and I'm falling dangerously short of my $150,000 goal. The stakes tonight couldn't be higher, Peter. The Republican Party is growing more and more radical. Just take a look right next door: In just the past year, the Texas GOP dismantled reproductive choice and totally suppressed the right to vote.
This election is a battle between those of us who want to push our state toward a brighter future – and a Republican Party that's dead-set on stripping us of our personal freedoms. It's up to us to defend our state from far-right radicals, and I need your help now more than ever.
**I need all hands on deck to help me hit our $150,000 goal before midnight. ****If I miss this goal tonight, I'll start 2022 behind the GOP, and our resources will have shrunk significantly before we can fundraise again in _March_. name: Marco Rubio
subject: Here is the memo I sent around
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
body:
Fellow Conservative, below is a memo I sent around to my staff this morning. & nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?30b36--fgxr-4qqlpo1&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

|

---
| | | Fellow Conservative, below is a memo I sent around to my staff this morning. Because you’re a valued member of our team, I wanted to make sure you saw this. Please don’t share this, and delete this as soon as you’re finished reading.
| To: Team Marco
Subject: State of Race 12.1.21
Status: SENSITIVE
Date: **[12/1/21](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-30b36-1nu47-4qqlpo0/ "12/1/21")**
Time: **[7:45 AM](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-30b36-1nu48-4qqlpo1/ "7:45 AM")**

Good Morning Team-

I promised I would be honest with you at all times.

So here’s an update on the state of my race so far:
* Recent polling shows my opponent is virtually tied with me
* _Fox News_ said this would be the most expensive Senate race ever
* _CNN_ listed my race as a top 10 seat to flip
* Senate Democrats have listed me as a top 3 target
* Pelosi Puppet Val Demings is spending thousands in online ads smearing me daily
* _Roll Call_ just labeled me as the most vulnerable Republican Senator running for re-election

Sorry to bring terrible news, but it’s true...and if we don’t meet our extended End of Month goal by midnight, I’m worried we won’t be able to fight back. **[Team, I’m hoping you’ll help me ramp up today because we’re going to need each and every patriot who wants to flip the Senate red, to donate $27 before midnight.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-30b36-1nu49-4qqlpo2/ "Team, I’m hoping you’ll help me ramp up today because we’re going to need each and every patriot who wants to flip the Senate red, to donate $27 before midnight.")**
---

Fellow Conservative, now that you see the memo do you understand why I’m sending it to you?
| | | [STAND WITH MARCO](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-30b36-1nu4a-4qqlpo2/ "STAND WITH MARCO")
---
If you were waiting to step up, now is the time. We need you now more than ever, we can’t afford for a single patriot to ignore this email. I’m relying on the support of grassroots conservatives like you to carry me across the finish line. **[So I’m pleading with you, don’t let us lose -- donate today.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-30b36-1nu4b-4qqlpo3/ "So I’m pleading with you, don’t let us lose -- donate today.")**

Thanks for all your help,

Marco Rubio
---
| |
* * *
---
| | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-30b36-1nu4c-4qqlpo4/ "MarcoRubioFooter")
---
| _Personal note from Marco Rubio:_

Fellow Conservative, thank you for standing with me and having my back every step of the way. But I need you to stand with me once again.

Fox News said my race could be the most expensive ever, CNN said my race was even MORE likely to flip blue, and now my opponent has outraised me. I need each and every patriot who receives this to join me in the fight to take back the Senate.

If you stand with me, **[please click here to donate now](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-30b36-1nu4d-4qqlpo5/ "please click here to donate now")**.

Thank you for everything you do,

Marco Rubio
---
| | | [DONATE](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-30b36-1nu4e-4qqlpo6/ "DONATE")
---

| Paid for by Marco Rubio for Senate
---

Miami, FL 33266

6890 E. Sunrise Dr.
Suite 120-137
Tucson Arizona 85750
United States

name: Susan (personal)
subject: humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress
body:
Now is the time to build a strong foundation to fight off Republican attacks.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39371676/319534914/-1089111386?refcode=BLU-SWC-20211205-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZDYwNWI4NS0wNTU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lxhs1Dat0I_iASLq38BI1ZmqsjETBsSVwKfAhjlR0B8=)
---
| Peter,

I hate to bother you on a Sunday, but this is important. I already have multiple Republican opponents vying to replace me in Congress, and some of them — like my far-right opponent from 2020 — have deep pockets. I know the elections feel far off, but now is the time to build a strong foundation to fight off Republican attacks.

I hate having to ask for your hard-earned money, but even $5 would go a long way in ensuring we have the resources we need to be successful, like campaign staff, advertising, and voter outreach. clean_body: Now is the time to build a strong foundation to fight off Republican attacks. | = | Peter, I hate to bother you on a Sunday, but this is important. I already have multiple Republican opponents vying to replace me in Congress, and some of them — like my far-right opponent from 2020 — have deep pockets. I know the elections feel far off, but now is the time to build a strong foundation to fight off Republican attacks. I hate having to ask for your hard-earned money, but even $5 would go a long way in ensuring we have the resources we need to be successful, like campaign staff, advertising, and voter outreach. = | = I’m so proud of what my Democratic colleagues and I have accomplished lately, like the infrastructure bill and the Build Back Better Act. name: Dr. Oz
subject: No More Carnage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Doctor Oz For Senate
body:
Biden failed, and left us with so little.

| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58939713:6VTTiQENQ:m:1:3298722022:AA675951B04997ACD7736467B345720C:r)
---

Peter,

_The collapse and carnage that is unfolding abroad and at our border is a true glimpse into the unmitigated disaster of Joe Biden and his administration._

I was heartbroken and disgusted by the Biden administration's reckless departure from Afghanistan that left Americans behind. Our people deserve better. _[**Join my campaign to bring back strong leadership to America.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58939713:6VTTiQENQ:m:1:3298722022:AA675951B04997ACD7736467B345720C:r)_

As a medical student at the Philadelphia VA hospital where I worked with veterans, I witnessed first-hand the sacrifices made by our men and women in uniform.

While I supported leaving Afghanistan, I believe President Biden displayed an utter dereliction of duty by surrendering to the Taliban. _The tragedy that ensued will weigh on our shoulders for years to come._

On the homefront, Biden has failed us as well: the surge of undocumented migrants crossing the Border has not slowed down since he has taken office. _**[Pitch in here to secure our border and put Americans first once again.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58939713:6VTTiQENQ:m:1:3298722022:AA675951B04997ACD7736467B345720C:r)**_

If left unchecked, this will not only become an economic disaster but a complete humanitarian catastrophe. _**[Americans can not endure another catastrophe of this magnitude.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58939713:6VTTiQENQ:m:1:3298722022:AA675951B04997ACD7736467B345720C:r)**_

**As Commander in Chief of the United States, Joe Biden has failed us.

Such a display of weakness on the world stage would not have happened under President Trump's leadership.**

I refuse to be led by such an incompetent leader any longer. His failures go far beyond political partisanship. Joe Biden's sickening actions should outrage every patriotic American. The U.S. is supposed to be a defender of democracy and a protector of its allies.

This administration is out of touch with the American people -- and we are sick of it.

As Pennsylvania's Senator, I will always put the people FIRST.

Thank You,

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58939713:6VTTiQENQ:m:1:3298722022:AA675951B04997ACD7736467B345720C:r)
Dr. Oz

* * *
_Dr. Oz is a Conservative running for U.S. Senate to reignite our divine spark, fight for freedom and return the power to you.**[Donate $25 today](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58939714:6VTTiQENQ:m:1:3298722022:AA675951B04997ACD7736467B345720C:r)** to ensure that he has the support he needs to become Pennsylvania's next Senator._
* * *
| Paid for by Doctor Oz For Senate

name: Rep. Demings
subject: I'm counting on you, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Val Demings for U
body:
I can win in Florida – but without you, friend, I cannot compete with GOP millions tipping the scales.
| | |
---
Friend, I'm 2 points behind Marco Rubio in the polls, and experts say this race will come down to who has the resources to compete.

**That's why this is so concerning: Florida can decide Senate control, and I'm currently short of my midnight fundraising goal. ****So my team sent me your updated supporter record:**
| | Supporter: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Suggested contribution: $5
Today's donation: **PENDING**
---
| | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39371996/319538260/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1849-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjQwMmE5ZS0wNjU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BvydjjOie7bdbYGdyfnel-i8bO56nWBXXk2dx4r3-5E=)
---
Donations from your area: 68% to goal
**Deadline: 11:59 p.m.**
---
This race is about more than just my unlikely story of opportunity – it's about a meaningful movement for Floridians and the country, it's about defending the Senate. Mitch McConnell only needs one seat to flip a 50/50 Senate – and we can't let Florida be the seat securing him Senate control.

We can win this – CNN is calling this seat a top pickup opportunity – but we have a steep hill to climb. The GOP is pouring more than $10 MILLION into organizing in Florida to register a groundbreaking number of Republican voters _._

**Republicans are working in overdrive to make sure no Democrat can flip Florida ever again, friend. This is our moment: It has never been more important to build the infrastructure to fight back, and we need to make early investments. We can't do that if we miss this goal. **
I know this people-powered movement is strong enough to defeat Marco Rubio and the GOP, but we need to raise another $50,000 RIGHT NOW to register more Democratic voters and flip Florida blue**. Please, friend, I'm counting on you to help me reach this goal:**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39371997/319538261/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1849-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjQwMmE5ZS0wNjU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BvydjjOie7bdbYGdyfnel-i8bO56nWBXXk2dx4r3-5E=)
**[Friend, rush $5 right now to help me close our fundraising gap before midnight tonight, pull ahead of Marco Rubio in the polls and defend our Democratic Senate majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39371998/319538262/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1849-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjQwMmE5ZS0wNjU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BvydjjOie7bdbYGdyfnel-i8bO56nWBXXk2dx4r3-5E=)**
I can't thank you enough for your support,

Val Demings
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

Email is an important way for us to keep this team informed about campaign updates. But if you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39371999/319538263/-144803992?refcode=jtk1849-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjQwMmE5ZS0wNjU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BvydjjOie7bdbYGdyfnel-i8bO56nWBXXk2dx4r3-5E=&emci=0740a5a9-b952-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93&emdi=32402a9e-0656-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=20244100), or click here to [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/0740a5a9-b952-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93/32402a9e-0656-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMjQwMmE5ZS0wNjU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BvydjjOie7bdbYGdyfnel-i8bO56nWBXXk2dx4r3-5E=&id=123159867). body:
In February of this year, I announced my campaign for Congress in Georgia’s 14th District against Marjorie Taylor Greene.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39372253/319540163/-825069922?refcode=20211017_tf_biglie&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDYxYjU1YS0wYzU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EtcCVyflmwiXrC_dSfSU0-EUPf-hS6AFsDk76phTnaU=) Hi, it’s Marcus Flowers. In February of this year, I announced my campaign for Congress in Georgia’s 14th District against Marjorie Taylor Greene. **When I set out to run for Congress, I made it a priority to meet people where they are. That means talking to them, hearing what they have to say, and what they’re interested in. ** Here’s what I can tell you with confidence: There is a huge percentage of voters in our district who are embarrassed by Marjorie Taylor Greene. _Like all Americans, people in this district want real representation from their Congressmember. And they know that they’re not getting it from Marjorie Taylor Greene._ **I’ve served this country for nearly thirty years -- and I’m committed to bringing that same spirit of service to Congress. But I need your help to get there. ** **[So today, I’m asking you to donate $25 or more to help me defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene and deliver real representation for Georgia.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39372254/319540164/-1217423743?refcode=2021205_mm_people&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDYxYjU1YS0wYzU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EtcCVyflmwiXrC_dSfSU0-EUPf-hS6AFsDk76phTnaU=) ** | **[DONATE NOW>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39372255/319540165/-825069922?refcode=2021205_mm_people&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDYxYjU1YS0wYzU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EtcCVyflmwiXrC_dSfSU0-EUPf-hS6AFsDk76phTnaU=)**

| Peter,

Socialism has no place in America. That's a message that voters all across the country just sent on Election Day recently in Virginia, New Jersey, and elsewhere.
People like you know that it only leads to higher prices, back-breaking taxes, chaos, and more Big Government control!
Our state and country have unfortunately been heading down this left-wing path at a dangerous pace -[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RK6vaBk7lTgX6xD84j_vce0imW2mmRc9cSe4t-50MJ3UlM_aRFYRquDIwj5GHbTxWdoIpvao0NIiLdu8ql_wGCYmszVeZE21XzgJSrhN52V6luanWxyl3JYJ7e2Fed338v98eH1zsWG5I2SC_JlX2nNQCSRMs7C1WMnDsCeCvQy323qCMl8v_T9Z4vFpkh69RF3y1tAObNV5WVNkL4YP8J73vAo850yh&c=pULxsXkBmt5T4h2a_4_qsyKXo0QYqMN6wQSlihrJqRtHzGA2aCPuqw==&ch=HvxQ7uDAM6T1eCax9HnW7yp-BB7cw3JTYMbpFX-gyaPb5R0HAG8sqg==)[so will you help Sheriff Joe Lombardo bring it to an end and keep Nevada safe from Socialism as our next Governor?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001RK6vaBk7lTgX6xD84j_vce0imW2mmRc9cSe4t-50MJ3UlM_aRFYRquDIwj5GHbTxWdoIpvao0NIiLdu8ql_wGCYmszVeZE21XzgJSrhN52V6luanWxyl3JYJ7e2Fed338v98eH1zsWG5I2SC_JlX2nNQCSRMs7C1WMnDsCeCvQy323qCMl8v_T9Z4vFpkh69RF3y1tAObNV5WVNkL4YP8J73vAo850yh&c=pULxsXkBmt5T4h2a_4_qsyKXo0QYqMN6wQSlihrJqRtHzGA2aCPuqw==&ch=HvxQ7uDAM6T1eCax9HnW7yp-BB7cw3JTYMbpFX-gyaPb5R0HAG8sqg==)

But now, more than anything, I need your personal endorsement. [**_If you already have my back, you can go ahead and sign your name here. >>_ If you’re not sure yet, please give me a chance to earn your support.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39372522/319541401/958816626?source=20211202_em_pet_b1_tv_30op_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmZmN2FmMC0wZTU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_G5vkoGi2qZgj6pYfj7oikhx6KIteyUbA8PH62f0nrA=&emci=0cedee13-0d56-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=7bff7af0-0e56-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=19927889)

Here’s what you need to know about me: I’m the proud son of union workers, a State Senator, former science teacher, and a Dad. I grew up in a working class family. My parents immigrated here in hopes of creating a good life for me and my brothers. It wasn’t easy -- we faced housing instability and lived paycheck to paycheck. But they believed in the American Dream, never gave up, and their hard work paid off.

[**_All of our families deserve a fighting chance at a good life. But my Republican opponent, Congressman Don Bacon, doesn’t have our backs -- he voted to cut taxes for the wealthy and left working class folks in the dust. I’m running for Congress to be the champion hardworking folks deserve, but this is going to be a close race. I need 1,000 endorsements today to prove I have the support of voters, so will you add your name now? >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39372523/319541402/958816626?source=20211202_em_pet_b1_tv_30op_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmZmN2FmMC0wZTU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_G5vkoGi2qZgj6pYfj7oikhx6KIteyUbA8PH62f0nrA=&emci=0cedee13-0d56-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=7bff7af0-0e56-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=19927889) | | [Endorse Tony!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39372524/319541403/958816626?source=20211202_em_pet_b1_tv_30op_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmZmN2FmMC0wZTU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_G5vkoGi2qZgj6pYfj7oikhx6KIteyUbA8PH62f0nrA=&emci=0cedee13-0d56-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=7bff7af0-0e56-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=19927889)

I promise you this: I will have your back everyday in Congress.
[**_And right now I’m hoping you’ll have my back once more, with your endorsement. >>_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39372525/319541404/958816626?source=20211202_em_pet_b1_tv_30op_rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YmZmN2FmMC0wZTU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_G5vkoGi2qZgj6pYfj7oikhx6KIteyUbA8PH62f0nrA=&emci=0cedee13-0d56-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=7bff7af0-0e56-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=19927889)

This fight is also high stakes. Joe Biden won the presidency because of Nebraska. Now, Tony’s fighting to finish what he started and flip this district blue.

name: Abby Finkenauer
subject: Nobody will work harder for Iowa
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa
body:
| | |
---
Peter,

I’m running for Iowa’s Senate seat against Sen. Chuck Grassley. I have every intention of winning – and nobody will work harder than I will to flip Iowa blue and give Iowa’s working families a voice in Washington.
But last time around, Iowa’s Senate race was one of the most expensive in the country, and with Senate control on the line, you better believe Mitch McConnell will spend heavily to keep this seat red. The only way we can win – and defeat a seven-term incumbent like Sen. Grassley – is if grassroots folks like you are with us.
**So today, I’m coming to you with an important ask:[Will you please become a Founding Donor to our campaign for the U.S. Senate? All it takes is a contribution of $5 or more, and every dollar you give will ensure we have the grassroots power to flip Iowa blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39372548/319541511/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk447-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTM2MjMwNS0wZjU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SZsf1t_VtL6l8ejVWbud82q_cnzE078k4JVjSxBMZS8=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39372549/319541512/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk447-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTM2MjMwNS0wZjU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SZsf1t_VtL6l8ejVWbud82q_cnzE078k4JVjSxBMZS8=)
Since we launched this campaign, political analysts from POLITICO and CNN have called it one of the most high-profile races in the country. All eyes are going to be on us – and believe me, there will be tons of talking heads saying we don’t have what it takes to defeat a deeply entrenched incumbent like Sen. Grassley.
I know this much is true: I’ve been underestimated my entire career by people who don’t think that a young woman like me has what it takes to win. But I’ve proved them wrong, going on to serve in the Iowa House of Representatives when I was 26 – and then becoming the youngest woman to ever flip a House seat from red to blue when I had the honor of representing Iowa’s 1st Congressional District.
**With your help, we’ll flip a Senate seat from red to blue, too.**
So let’s show the political class what happens when they underestimate us. Let’s build an unstoppable grassroots movement from the start and fight with everything we have – and win – come Election Day.******Will you make a donation now to help me win in Iowa?**
**[Donate $5 or more now – whatever you can spare before midnight tonight to become a Founding Donor to our grassroots campaign – so we can defeat Sen. Grassley and flip Iowa blue.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39372550/319541513/805649176?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk447-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MzU5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NTM2MjMwNS0wZjU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SZsf1t_VtL6l8ejVWbud82q_cnzE078k4JVjSxBMZS8=)**
So grateful for your support.

Abby

clean_body: | | | Peter, I’m running for Iowa’s Senate seat against Sen. Chuck Grassley. I have every intention of winning – and nobody will work harder than I will to flip Iowa blue and give Iowa’s working families a voice in Washington. But last time around, Iowa’s Senate race was one of the most expensive in the country, and with Senate control on the line, you better believe Mitch McConnell will spend heavily to keep this seat red. The only way we can win – and defeat a seven-term incumbent like Sen. Grassley – is if grassroots folks like you are with us. So today, I’m coming to you with an important ask:= = Since we launched this campaign, political analysts from POLITICO and CNN have called it one of the most high-profile races in the country. All eyes are going to be on us – and believe me, there will be tons of talking heads saying we don’t have what it takes to defeat a deeply entrenched incumbent like Sen. Grassley. I know this much is true: I’ve been underestimated my entire career by people who don’t think that a young woman like me has what it takes to win. But I’ve proved them wrong, going on to serve in the Iowa House of Representatives when I was 26 – and then becoming the youngest woman to ever flip a House seat from red to blue when I had the honor of representing Iowa’s 1st Congressional District. With your help, we’ll flip a Senate seat from red to blue, too. So let’s show the political class what happens when they underestimate us. Let’s build an unstoppable grassroots movement from the start and fight with everything we have – and win – come Election Day.****Will you make a donation now to help me win in Iowa? = So grateful for your support. Abby | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. | | Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa PO Box 1843 Cedar Rapids, IA 52406 United States

The way we see it, this race ends in one of two ways:

* **_OUTCOME 2:_** [**We hit each and every one of our fundraising goals (including catching up on our goals BEFORE the end of the year).**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39372873/319543401/-2139570960?refcode=20211205_f_1_fl&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3M2EwZmNlOC0xMzU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QlC-_Y6RuWDsnIaKA4goaX2znjL5U0GyiOYTRQbMzPc=) We **DEFEAT** Gov. clean_body: | | | | | Team, It’s been a few days since the end of our fundraising blackout -- and as Steve’s Finance Director, I’m relieved that we’re starting to rebuild this campaign’s resources. But remember that while we were unable to fundraise at all,Steve’s 6 right-wing opponents were busy stockpiling cash. | | | I don’t need to remind you what’s at stake here. All the progress this team has fought for -- passing a public health care option, increasing critical funding for public schools, expanding voting rights, raising the minimum wage \-- could all be gone on Day 1 if any of Steve's opponents win in 2022. And with Trump promising to come to Nevada soon and build a massive field program, we need to generate a HUGE swell of grassroots support to Keep Nevada Blue. We’ve got a lot of catching up to do. | | | | | | | | | | | | Thank you for your help, Eva Black Finance Director Sisolak for Governor | | If you'd like to support Steve Sisolak for Governor, you can | Paid for and Authorized by Committee to Elect Steve Sisolak Steve Sisolak for Governor P.O. name: Martin Heinrich
subject: Roe v. Wade (petition).
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Martin Heinrich for Senate
body:
Add your name >> [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39373237/319545339/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_PET_GEN_AC_20211205_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTZlMWMxZS0xNzU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IiRj_58FOkb0VsvLRzB10ZmEE31EUYNyCVYYEwwzVFQ=&emci=8ae354db-0456-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=3e6e1c1e-1756-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=252045)
---
Folks, just days ago, the Supreme Court heard arguments in a case that could directly overturn _Roe v. Wade_ and dismantle women’s health care rights. This is the same Supreme Court that is now stacked with conservative judges that Donald Trump nominated. **It can seem unthinkable, but it’s real and it’s imminent.** _Roe v. Wade_ is more at risk of being overturned right now than it has been since it was decided nearly 50 years ago. **This is bad for women and everyone who believes in equitable access to health care and a woman’s constitutional right to choose.** We need to act quickly at the federal level. We need to make sure that the reproductive rights of every woman, no matter what state she lives in, are protected. [**I’m proud to be an original co-sponsor of the _Women’s Health Protection Act_ , which would protect women’s reproductive rights no matter what the Court does next. Will you add your name to call on the U.S. Senate to pass this bill? Time is of the essence here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39373239/319545340/1680769979?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_PET_GEN_AC_20211205_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTZlMWMxZS0xNzU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IiRj_58FOkb0VsvLRzB10ZmEE31EUYNyCVYYEwwzVFQ=&emci=8ae354db-0456-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=3e6e1c1e-1756-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=252045) | [ADD YOUR NAME →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39373246/319545345/1680769979?refcode=AU_MTH_EG_PET_GEN_AC_20211205_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZTZlMWMxZS0xNzU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IiRj_58FOkb0VsvLRzB10ZmEE31EUYNyCVYYEwwzVFQ=&emci=8ae354db-0456-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=3e6e1c1e-1756-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=252045)

Thank you for your support on this.
— Martin

We thought Republicans were on track to take back the Senate, but after seeing this fact sheet, we're not so sure...

_In response to Trump-endorsed Marco Rubio, Democrats have decided to prop up a Radical Former Trump Impeachment Manager to run against him.

Marco Rubio was named the MOST VULNERABLE Republican Senator running for re-election.

Marco Rubio's opponent has raised $14 Million Dollars since she announced her candidacy._

name: Brent Bozell
subject: We are winning the war against Fake News media outlets 👈
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58937451:JgCBcQENY:m:1:3253819041:C624D7C3B6DCF7F4FFFCAD5ADFA6C7FA:r)
Peter,

The Leftwing media are merchants of lies, half-truths, and deception... Their true objective is NOT to report the news but push their radical agenda.

My name is Brent Bozell, I am the President and Founder of the Media Research Center (MRC). MRC is the only conservative organization dedicated to exposing the radical Left-wing agenda in the media.

Thanks to MRC, roughly 90% of Americans DO NOT trust the Fake News media anymore.

You and I are winning the war against Fake News media outlets such as MSNBC, NBC, CNN, and more. You can support MRC's mission to expose the Leftwing media by donating $10, $20.22, $50, $100 or any by clicking [here](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58937451:JgCBcQENY:m:1:3253819041:C624D7C3B6DCF7F4FFFCAD5ADFA6C7FA:r).

Radical leftists in the media are attempting to take over our elections, pass budgets that will bankrupt our nation, chip away at the Second Amendment, and destroy our culture.

Here are the TOP 5 biggest media lies of 2021:

1. **Staging a fake racist stunt against a GOP gubernatorial candidate:** Members of the "Lincoln Project" staged a photo op in front of Glenn Youngkin's campaign bus, holding tiki torches and pretending to be racist supporters of the GOP candidate. The story was PROVEN fake and CNN continued to support the stunt in any way.

Disgusting. [**Help the Media Research Center fight Fake News like CNN by donating $10, $50, $100, $250 or more here >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58937451:JgCBcQENY:m:1:3253819041:C624D7C3B6DCF7F4FFFCAD5ADFA6C7FA:r)

2. **Attempting to put Kyle Rittenhouse behind bars:** It's no secret the Leftwing media was trying to influence the jury to convict Kyle Rittenhouse and destroy this young man's life. The judge even barred MSNBC from the courtroom when they followed the jury's bus back to their hotel...

[**Help the Media Research Center expose MSNBC and Fake News Journalists by donating $10, $50, $100, $250 or or more here >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58937451:JgCBcQENY:m:1:3253819041:C624D7C3B6DCF7F4FFFCAD5ADFA6C7FA:r)

3. **Covering up a rape in order to protect Woke educators:** A father attended a school board meeting in Loudoun county Virginia, demanding answers and accountability for his daughter being raped by a "non-binary" boy wearing a skirt. Instead of answers, this man was arrested and now the FBI is monitoring parents who are involved in their child's education.

The media decided to side with the Loudoun county school officials and helped cover up the rape story.

This is a disgusting new low for the Fake News media. [**Help the Media Research Center spread the TRUTH about stories like this by donating $10, $50, $100, $250, or more here >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58937451:JgCBcQENY:m:1:3253819041:C624D7C3B6DCF7F4FFFCAD5ADFA6C7FA:r)

4. **Defending Anthony Fauci 's lies to Congress: **Fauci lied to Congress and MSNBC, CNN, NBC, the New York Times, and more all continued to defend him. This man needs to be fired for his lies to the American people.

[**Help the Media Research Center hold LIARS like Anthony Fauci by sharing the truth! Donate $10, $50, $100, $250 or more here >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58937451:JgCBcQENY:m:1:3253819041:C624D7C3B6DCF7F4FFFCAD5ADFA6C7FA:r)

5. **Protecting Joe Biden 's failing Presidency:** Biased news anchors and reporters are doing everything possible to keep Biden in power. They are covering up his failures in Afghanistan, inflation, huge deficits, and more.

Why am I sharing these with you? Because they are only the tip of the iceberg.

The Fake News media is one of the greatest threats to our Republic, to our constitution, to our culture, and to the principles of liberty.

MRC has SHATTERED trust in the Fake News media... but they have become aggressive and distribute lies through new mediums such as social media.

I am asking you to invest in the Media Research Center and help us combat Fake News media.

Here is how MRC is FIGHTING BACK!

* MRC records all Fake News media outlets to identify lies, half-truths, and lies of omission. In fact, we have over 800,000 hours of recorded video and audio from TV, radio, and podcasts.

* We use this content to expose the truth and show everyday Americans how the Fake News media is using their influence to enact socialism, advocate for Critical Race Theory, and sabotage conservatives.

* MRC is combatting online censorship by building MASSIVE social media pages to distribute the truth. I am proud to report MRC's social media team has several MILLION followers and we reach millions of Americans each week with our message.

My goal is to raise $5,000 from online supporters in the next 48 hours. Please support the Media Research Center's critical mission by making a donation using one of the links below:

[**Donate $10 >>>
Donate $20.22 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Donate $500 >>>
Donate $1,000 >>>
Donate ANY Amount >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58937451:JgCBcQENY:m:1:3253819041:C624D7C3B6DCF7F4FFFCAD5ADFA6C7FA:r)

Your support empowers MRC to expose bias in the media, hold the media accountable, and spread the truth. The United States will never remain a free country without holding the Leftwing media accountable.

I am counting on your support.

Thank you for everything, Peter.

Brent Bozell
Founder & President of MRC

You can support MRC's mission to expose the Leftwing media by donating $10, $20.22, $50, $100 or any by clicking . Radical leftists in the media are attempting to take over our elections, pass budgets that will bankrupt our nation, chip away at the Second Amendment, and destroy our culture. Here are the TOP 5 biggest media lies of 2021: 1. Staging a fake racist stunt against a GOP gubernatorial candidate: Members of the "Lincoln Project" staged a photo op in front of Glenn Youngkin's campaign bus, holding tiki torches and pretending to be racist supporters of the GOP candidate. The story was PROVEN fake and CNN continued to support the stunt in any way. Disgusting. 2. Attempting to put Kyle Rittenhouse behind bars: It's no secret the Leftwing media was trying to influence the jury to convict Kyle Rittenhouse and destroy this young man's life. The judge even barred MSNBC from the courtroom when they followed the jury's bus back to their hotel... 3. Covering up a rape in order to protect Woke educators: A father attended a school board meeting in Loudoun county Virginia, demanding answers and accountability for his daughter being raped by a "non-binary" boy wearing a skirt. Instead of answers, this man was arrested and now the FBI is monitoring parents who are involved in their child's education. The media decided to side with the Loudoun county school officials and helped cover up the rape story. This is a disgusting new low for the Fake News media. 4. Defending Anthony Fauci 's lies to Congress: Fauci lied to Congress and MSNBC, CNN, NBC, the New York Times, and more all continued to defend him. This man needs to be fired for his lies to the American people. 5. Protecting Joe Biden 's failing Presidency: Biased news anchors and reporters are doing everything possible to keep Biden in power. They are covering up his failures in Afghanistan, inflation, huge deficits, and more. Why am I sharing these with you? Because they are only the tip of the iceberg. The Fake News media is one of the greatest threats to our Republic, to our constitution, to our culture, and to the principles of liberty. MRC has SHATTERED trust in the Fake News media... but they have become aggressive and distribute lies through new mediums such as social media. I am asking you to invest in the Media Research Center and help us combat Fake News media. Here is how MRC is FIGHTING BACK! MRC records all Fake News media outlets to identify lies, half-truths, and lies of omission. In fact, we have over 800,000 hours of recorded video and audio from TV, radio, and podcasts. We use this content to expose the truth and show everyday Americans how the Fake News media is using their influence to enact socialism, advocate for Critical Race Theory, and sabotage conservatives. * MRC is combatting online censorship by building MASSIVE social media pages to distribute the truth. I am proud to report MRC's social media team has several MILLION followers and we reach millions of Americans each week with our message. My goal is to raise $5,000 from online supporters in the next 48 hours. Please support the Media Research Center's critical mission by making a donation using one of the links below: Your support empowers MRC to expose bias in the media, hold the media accountable, and spread the truth. The United States will never remain a free country without holding the Leftwing media accountable. I am counting on your support. Thank you for everything, Peter. name: CheriBeasley.com
subject: 50 seats is not enough
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
#

50 Senate seats is not enough. Period.
Democrats need a real majority that can pass legislation to meaningfully improve people’s lives, and that’s why we have to flip North Carolina in 2022.
**[If you’re ready to make real progress and expand our majority, can you make a $3 donation to our campaign today? North Carolina is an open seat, and Cheri Beasley is our best chance to win this race.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-dec21?refcode=em211205-1-t2&refcode2=101.357359.yQ2kCx&t=1&akid=101%2E357359%2EyQ2kCx)**
Democrats have the opportunity to make real progress, but the gridlock, delays and lack of progress we’re seeing from the Senate right now is proof that we need more than 50 seats.
The truth is that 50 seats is not a real majority. It’s a tie.
Democrats have put forward common sense, popular ideas — bills that are supported by a majority of Americans across political parties. Now Democrats need to expand their numbers in the Senate to get these bills to the president’s desk.
Flipping this seat can change what’s possible, and Cheri will be proud to be the deciding YES vote on voting rights, climate legislation, a $15 minimum wage, codifying Roe and more — even if it means ending the filibuster.
If a $3 donation today could make all the difference, wouldn’t that be worth it?
**[Please consider making that $3 donation today, so we can flip this seat and expand our majority. Your support is critical if we’re going to win real progress on the most important issues.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-dec21?refcode=em211205-1-t2&refcode2=101.357359.yQ2kCx&t=2&akid=101%2E357359%2EyQ2kCx)**

clean_body: Mitch McConnell and his Republican minions are trying to block President Biden’s incredible agenda at every turn. | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. | | Mitch McConnell and his Republican allies are trying to block President Biden’s incredible agenda at every turn. And we’re worried it’s working. So much of President Biden’s agenda is at a stalemate... This is what’s at stake: ✅ Lower prescription drug prices, ✅ Paid family leave, ✅ Medicare expansion, ✅ Universal Pre-K, ✅ And SO MUCH MORE! Thanks in advance, \--Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. If you would like to receive only our most important emails, . Thanks for being a part of the team. | | Sent via . body:
We don’t need a Senator who is hell-bent on opposing any measure that will help working families in Wisconsin. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39373389/319546289/464806879?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmZlMTc1Ni0xYTU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q4UzgpnPqeLRntd4XzQDiLuDcS1q_e9XLe_y2r8CLi0=&emci=c2f18d4c-7654-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=a2fe1756-1a56-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=25515813) | Team, Gillian is running for Senate to make positive change in the lives of Wisconsinites. That’s exactly what the Infrastructure Package, passed by Democrats and signed into law by President Biden, will do for us. The investment will address issues that have been lingering for far too long by sending our state:
* $5.5 billion to fix roads and bridges.
* $800 million to upgrade the water systems and replace lead pipes.
* $100 million to expand access to broadband.
* Vast investment in green jobs.

Improved roads, clean drinking water, green jobs. These are broadly popular measures across partisan lines. But Ron Johnson voted against sending this funding for infrastructure to our state. **We don’t need a Senator who is hell-bent on opposing any measure that will help working families in Wisconsin. We need a Senator who will continue to fight for the people instead of corporations. ** [**If you agree with us, chip in a donation to our campaign today to beat Ron Johnson and elect Gillian to the Senate.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39373390/319546290/1807662573?refcode=E12769-20211205-Infrastructure-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmZlMTc1Ni0xYTU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q4UzgpnPqeLRntd4XzQDiLuDcS1q_e9XLe_y2r8CLi0=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to defeat Ron Johnson and elect the first Democratic woman physician to the U.S. Senate will go through immediately:_ | **[$3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39373391/319546291/600862964?express_lane=true&refcode=E12769-20211205-EG-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmZlMTc1Ni0xYTU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q4UzgpnPqeLRntd4XzQDiLuDcS1q_e9XLe_y2r8CLi0=)** | **[$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39373392/319546292/600862964?express_lane=true&refcode=E12769-20211205-EG-RegTemplate-NA-EG&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmZlMTc1Ni0xYTU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Q4UzgpnPqeLRntd4XzQDiLuDcS1q_e9XLe_y2r8CLi0=)**

name: Rand Paul
subject: now Fauci is lying about me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6531%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=sujKJwI1309VcT6Q68v4NQ&sysid=1)
**It’s time to FIRE FAUCI!** **[Chip in if you agree! >>](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68518%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9byqT78Ywthb4uy1ImapHA&sysid=1)** __ [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68519%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FpyOUop82tPA%2f1MKSgG6hg&sysid=1) | |
---
Friend, Fauci is absolutely out of control.

He's lied about COVID from the very beginning. He lied about masks. He lied about funding gain of function research.

_Now, he's lying about ME._

This weekend, Dr. Fauci called me out personally for criticizing his absolute failures. He said that anyone criticizing him is really attacking science. He told an adoring anchor that anyone who opposes him is _"really criticizing science because I represent science."_

The absolute hubris is almost too much to take \- and it's yet another reason it's time to show Fauci the door.
__
[**I AGREE: FIRE FAUCI >>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68510%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=khDh%2fPQOR678VP3yOZbcMA&sysid=1)
__
Friend, it's truly astounding and alarming that a public health bureaucrat would even think to claim such a thing.

_"I represent science."_

It's especially insane to hear that from someone who has worked so hard to ignore the science.
__
* He won't acknowledge natural immunity.
* He wants kids masked and vaccinated despite the evidence that suggests both could be more harmful to them than the actual virus.
* He continues to move the goalposts HE set for "progress" on the virus.

__
It’s clear all the power has gotten to his head and it’s about time we send him home.

**If you’re with me and you want to FIRE FAUCI, I hope you’ll chip in now:[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-3292728/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68511%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WjXViMLsDA2vZ%2fD8T%2feV2A&sysid=1)**

I know my effort to dismiss Fauci is clearly getting to him - that’s why he’s spewing this nonsense on TV! But I have to keep up the fight against the Fauci-loving bureaucracy if we truly want to see this man fired.

Please, chip in what you can to join the fight.
__
[**FIRE FAUCI: $100**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68512%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mJFNZf7r5ze97TVZ7FY%2bLw&sysid=1)
[**FIRE FAUCI: $75**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68513%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=TnjOlCqcZjQH752Z%2fuFUfw&sysid=1)
[**FIRE FAUCI: $50**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68514%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=2GPnaXeqmYHnPKunQou8Rw&sysid=1)

name: Charles Booker
subject: My thoughts on the Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[1]Charles Booker

Peter,

Wednesday’s arguments before the Supreme Court around the Dobbs v. Jackson
Women’s Health Organization case was the biggest threat we’ve seen to Roe
v. Wade to date.

We won’t know the final verdict on Dobbs for months, but we can see this
case for what it really is: fear and division being weaponized to
politicize the courts and harm our families and millions of women across
this country.

This is an attempt to bring the government into the doctor’s examination
room — a gross overstep of power — purely to embolden a far right
political base. The health of our families and millions of women should
not be in the hands of nine judges, and it is unacceptable for anyone to
think they can make deeply personal health decisions for other people,
especially politicians.

Infringements on our healthcare — particularly right now, in the middle of
a pandemic that has taken so much from us — are wrong. We must keep
organizing to make sure everyone has quality healthcare, including
abortion coverage.

Reproductive healthcare must be protected. Women’s rights must be
protected. The freedom to make personal medical decisions with your family
and your doctor alone must be protected. But none of this is a reality
without new leadership.

Thankfully, Peter,
your support allows us to do just that. Together, we’re building our
grassroots organizing strategy, reaching out to voters across Kentucky,
and getting Rand Paul out of office so we can end the attacks on our
rights like this.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13532?refcode=em20211205-1299&t=1020&akid=1299%2E346206%2E4TMame ]Now more than ever, I’m ready to fight — and to represent Kentucky in
the U.S. Senate so I can get to work for our Commonwealth. If you believe
that Kentucky deserves a leader who will fight for us, please chip in
whatever you can afford to our campaign today.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13532?refcode=em20211205-1299&t=1021&akid=1299%2E346206%2E4TMame ]Contribute $5

Look. Our work isn’t about Democrats, Republicans, or Independents — it's
about humanity, family, and taking care of one another. We should all be
able to pursue our dreams and make decisions over our own lives. Period.

Right now, the Supreme Court has the urgent responsibility to dismiss all
challenges to limit or overturn Roe v. Wade, and affirm the humanity,
agency, and constitutional rights of privacy, freedom, and quality
healthcare for all. But longer term, we must fight to make sure all people
can make choices over their health care and their lives.

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/13532?refcode=em20211205-1299&t=1022&akid=1299%2E346206%2E4TMame ]I’m ready to be that leader for Kentucky,
Peter, but I need your help.
Please chip in $5 or whatever you can afford to our
grassroots campaign.

Let’s organize,

Charles Booker

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20211205-1299-footer&t=1023&refcode2=1299_346206_4TMame&akid=1299%2E346206%2E4TMame

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1299%2E346206%2E4TMame

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

But longer term, we must fight to make sure all people can make choices over their health care and their lives. [ ]I’m ready to be that leader for Kentucky, Peter, but I need your help. Please chip in $5 or whatever you can afford to our grassroots campaign. Let’s organize, Charles Booker Contribute to Charles Booker:

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Your thoughts on the Second Amendment
body:
The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis
[View this message in your browser](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zl07n37eed8uv8fcj9mq8c7h97g439usoqnaa9ug_rp22sh2s8i66pj0stgmcob2cdh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpqct9hmcp7acdkmgprcd9m6kpr2sjk66pqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65t9jchq34o3jeprr0s70e6or6thn6ko78dbgm2o69otjceq64d30m1h66oll6ao6fkjge9h6cs5icpoe9cr3c1pb0pjhesqrcdti69j32c5icpge1db3c3gbac9hmkorash5u)
This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zingvdu9eruhsklpifhtmg49rge5hojgbbveit6g_rp22sh2s8i66pj0stgmcob2cdh2bs) Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you’re receiving Hillsdale College’s **Second Amendment Survey** because you’re someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2zm1253h6skj5dfprp0mooq2a3soskr0so19t648o_rp22sh2s8i66pj0stgmcob2cdh2bs "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/")** Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty—which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left’s most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: “The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**.” This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where “safe spaces” are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here’s an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause “panic” among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. **But instead of just TALKING, it’s more important to DO something about it.** That’s why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That’s why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2ztv62btt7glf2le88fml1s8ck11hi7bue6ppu7n8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0stgmcob2cdh2bs)** We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, “Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It’s also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty—including the Second Amendment—for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we’ll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you. This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry—supplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** Our Constitution—including the Second Amendment—is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z52j8on40ufh01sngeft3enfe24187bulip0oad8_rp22sh2s8i66pj0stgmcob2cdh2bs)**
---
| This email was sent by: Self-Reliance Central

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: Sign the No Forced COVID Vax Open Letter
body:
By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6547%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=caF4slNsiZUDfVfjnFnMtg&sysid=1)
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68528%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bjXFgU1A2oRnd3rN6Gi5fw&sysid=1) Fellow American, By now, I’m sure you're as furious as I am with the White House’s absurd and illegal COVID vaccine mandate. The federal government has **_NO POWER_** to get involved in your medical decisions. **__PERIOD_!_** But for millions of college students in America today, it’s not just the federal government they have to worry about. **In fact, more than 2,500 colleges and universities are __FORCING__ students to get the COVID vaccine... __DEMANDING__ that they publicly share their medical history... and __BANNING__ them from school if they don’t comply!** My friend, this is the pattern for vaccine mandates across America--including Joe Biden’s. And if we don’t stand up against it now, there’s no telling how aggressive the federal government will get in their quest to force this vaccine on you and me whether we want it or not. [**_That’s why Turning Point USA and our army of 400,000 student activists are leading the battle against forced COVID vaccines on campus. Will you stand with these students today by signing TPUSA’s National Open Letter Against Forced COVID Vaccinations?_**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68529%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6c1vdfC28PNFtx4cS4xKdQ&sysid=1) [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68528%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=%2bjXFgU1A2oRnd3rN6Gi5fw&sysid=1) To ensure that students are ready to win the fight for freedom against radical college administrations, we’ve launched a **“NO FORCED VAX”** campaign and created engaging and educational activism kits that we’re shipping out to students every week. [**Your signature right now will help complement that effort by showing these Leftist university administrators just how many Real Americans are opposed to their radical policies.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68520%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=I07rgV%2bubj3YLO8%2fCnTDig&sysid=1) This move by the universities is not about vaccines **_AT ALL_**. It’s about freedom, choice, information, and constitutional rights. Young and healthy students --the least affected by the disease -- must be free to decide what is best for them alongside their doctors... not college administrators or bureaucrats. The same goes for all Americans, but the Biden administration has watched what these universities have been able to get away with--and put their policies on steroids. As I write this email, thousands of students have been denied reentry to their campuses until they can show proof of vaccination. One student at Rutgers was even locked out of his __ONLINE__ college classes until he takes the vaccine! **If we let these schools exercise this kind of power over their students, I hate to see what the White House comes up with next!** We must win this campus battle right now, or we’ll be fighting it on our own doorsteps. [**Please partner with TPUSA _NOW_ in the fight against forced COVID vaccinations! With your signature on the National Open Letter today, you’ll help turn up the heat on these radical universities and stand with conservative students across America as they defend their freedom.**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68521%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=IyHiht6C8sS1UDvMBndbfQ&sysid=1) [**Stop Forced Vaccination!**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68522%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=B7TU%2bvKgDMhwDxWadnrxgw&sysid=1) Thank you for your support! For America, Charlie Kirk Founder & CEO Turning Point USA 4940 East Beverly Road
Phoenix, Arizona 85044
---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6547%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=caF4slNsiZUDfVfjnFnMtg&sysid=1)_

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/CB.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6547%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=caF4slNsiZUDfVfjnFnMtg&sysid=1)

name: Nikki Haley
subject: If you support Israel, you need to read this immediately
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand for America PAC
body:
Nothing is more important than stopping Huwaida Arraf
& nbsp; &nb; sp;
Not interested? [Unsubscribe Here](https://trk.cp20.com/form?30cdb--fgxr-4qqlpo5&sl=2d&t=5&ac=gh7s)

| | Fellow Conservative,

If you don’t know who Huwaida Arraf is, I need you to keep reading this email.

**[If you do know who she is, I need you to donate right away to help us stop her.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-30cdb-1nupm-4qqlpo8/ "If you do know who she is, I need you to donate right away to help us stop her.")**

---
| | | [STOP HUWAIDA ARRAF NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-30cdb-1nupn-4qqlpo9/)
---

Here are five things you need to know about Huwaida Arraf:
1. She founded an anti-Israel group _**known for provoking violent confrontations**_ with the Israeli military that _**has been investigated by the FBI for possible ties to terrorism.**_
2. She co-authored an op-ed that promoted violence against Israelis and said: “ _**Yes, people will get killed and injured,**_ ” but these deaths are “no less noble than carrying out a suicide operation. And we are certain that if these men were killed during such an action, _**they would be considered shaheed Allah.**_ ”
3. She has _**provided protection for terrorists,**_ even acting as a voluntary human shield for them.
4. She co-organized the “Free Gaza Flotilla” _**which led to violent clashes**_ with the Israeli Navy.
5. Now, _**she’s running for Congress**_ in Michigan’s 10th Congressional District.

Nothing is more important than stopping Huwaida Arraf.

In order to do that, we must support Rep. Lisa McClain – the pro-Israel Republican who is currently representing the district.

---
| | | [SUPPORT REP. LISA McCLAIN NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-30cdb-1nupo-4qqlpo0/)
---

**[If you stand with Israel, I am urging you to rush anything you can to help Rep. Lisa McClain defeat Huwaida Arraf.](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-30cdb-1nupp-4qqlpo1/ "If you stand with Israel, I am urging you to rush anything you can to help Rep. Lisa McClain defeat Huwaida Arraf.")**

Thank you in advance for your generous support.

My very best,

Nikki R. Haley

---
| | | [DONATE NOW](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-30cdb-1nupq-4qqlpo2/)
---
| | | [](https://trk.cp20.com/click/gh7s-30cdb-1nupr-4qqlpo3/ "Nikki Haley Image")

I’m focused on helping Republicans win the next election and I want YOU to play an important part. This is a great opportunity to support political leaders who believe America is inherently good, and who understand that the Democrats' far-left policies undermine our freedoms and American values.

Please help me fight back against the Democrats and their radical agenda. We can only defeat them if we stand united.

subject: A recent survey of Wisconsin voters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin
body:
Real quick — have you seen this recent survey of Wisconsin voters from _Public Policy Polling_? Right now, Sarah Godlewski is **the only Democrat leading Ron Johnson in a head-to-head match-up.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39374058/319549263/-1116050000?refcode=em21_211205_poll1_fndd_gq_act___TS_ettx_algif&utm_campaign=em21_211205_poll1_fndd_gq_act___TS_ettx_algif&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sarah-godlewski&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODI4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMzVhMWJmMC0yMTU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aMYqlbGQJPEF_rwsFC3oNlmYaTW81IBEZ_iEKI1nO6c=) Here’s the problem: Ron Johnson is a two-term incumbent with Donald Trump's full endorsement and more than $2 million cash-on-hand, which means beating him won’t be easy. As you know, Wisconsin doesn’t do landslides — we’re known for nailbiter elections. That’s why we’ve got to start organizing and reaching voters early.

clean_body: Real quick — have you seen this recent survey of Wisconsin voters from Public Policy Polling? Right now, Sarah Godlewski is the only Democrat leading Ron Johnson in a head-to-head match-up. = Here’s the problem: Ron Johnson is a two-term incumbent with Donald Trump's full endorsement and more than $2 million cash-on-hand, which means beating him won’t be easy. As you know, Wisconsin doesn’t do landslides — we’re known for nailbiter elections. That’s why we’ve got to start organizing and reaching voters early. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for everything! — Team Sarah Sarah Godlewski is running for U.S. Senate to put hard-working Wisconsin families first. Chip in to join our grassroots campaign: | = Paid for by Sarah for Wisconsin Sarah for Wisconsin PO Box 166 Madison, WI 53701 United States

body:
This race is going to be one of the closest elections ever held in Texas.
#
Big news: **New polls show Beto in a dead heat with Greg Abbott:**
[](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50333?refcode=ema20211205-165603&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=165603%2E444211%2EDTPFwD)

[With this race officially neck-and-neck, we’re setting a rapid-response goal to raise $50,000 from online donors in the next 24 hours. Please rush a donation right now to help Beto hit this critical goal →](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/50333?refcode=ema20211205-165603&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=165603%2E444211%2EDTPFwD)

name: Team Fetterman
subject: Your #SupporterRecordWrapped is here
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Is your name on our list of 2021 grassroots donors?
#
Derek,
If you listen to music on Spotify, it’s always fun seeing who your top musical artists were at the end of the year. (C’mon, how many of you have Taylor Swift at #1? Don’t be shy, raise your hand 🙋🙋🙋)
But with just a few weeks left in 2021, our team was wondering: What does your year with Team Fetterman look like? **Welcome to your official 2021 Team Fetterman #SupporterRecordWrapped****, Derek!**
**_Derek's Official 2021 Team Fetterman #SupporterRecordWrapped*_** **Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com **2021 Donor:** No — not yet! **2021 Total:** $0.00 **Suggested Donation: $5** **[Donate Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37951?refcode=em20211205-3722&t=1&akid=3722%2E434096%2EFDM6lQ)** *_Our data isn’t perfect. If you’ve contributed using a different email address or via check, you may not see that amount reflected here. But please know that John, Gisele, and the team are deeply grateful for your generosity!_
---
Derek, it only takes $5 (or any amount you like) to add your name to the list of amazing grassroots donors who can say they chipped in in 2021 to fuel John’s campaign for U.S. Senate. [Will you make your first donation right now? ](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37951?refcode=em20211205-3722&t=3&akid=3722%2E434096%2EFDM6lQ)
It’s almost hard to believe how far we’ve come since launching back in February. In less than a year, we’ve become the leading campaign to flip this seat blue in 2022 and win the 51st vote to lock in our Democratic majority in the U.S. Senate.
**And it’s ALL because of our uniquely dedicated online supporters.**
We’re getting ready to hit the ground running in 2022 — expanding our organizing all across Pennsylvania, recruiting more volunteers, and making sure not a single voter falls through the cracks. But saying no to corporate PAC money means John is counting on this grassroots team to come together before the end of the year.
[**What do you say, Derek? Will you make your first donation right now?**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37951?refcode=em20211205-3722&t=4&akid=3722%2E434096%2EFDM6lQ)**You can’t change your Spotify wrapped, but you CAN change your #SupporterRecordWrapped by chipping in to support John!**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/37951?refcode=em20211205-3722&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=3722%2E434096%2EFDM6lQ)**
Thank you for showing your support today,
Team Fetterman HQ

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211205-3722-footer&t=24&refcode2=3722_434096_FDM6lQ&akid=3722%2E434096%2EFDM6lQ)**
