name: Marcus Flowers
subject: FWD: Is it time to codify Roe into law?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcus for Georgia
body:
I want to hear from you --

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39374300/319550856/-825069922?refcode=20211017_tf_biglie&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODIxY2Q1My0yNzU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Iywu4vgBLieN9INSVXBMMqOtHShIPFL8brbIkPsrHxg=) Hi, did you see the message my team sent you? We’re trying to get a sense from our supporters: With the Supreme Court threatening to reverse abortion protections, do you think Democrats should codify Roe into law? **[I have my own opinions on the matter -- but I want to know what you think. So please, click here to add your name.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39374301/319550857/34719616?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODIxY2Q1My0yNzU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Iywu4vgBLieN9INSVXBMMqOtHShIPFL8brbIkPsrHxg=&emci=7e975c09-0456-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=4821cd53-2756-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=24979035)** Thanks for your support, -Marcus Flowers **\----Begin forwarded message----**
From: Team Flowers <info@marcusforgeorgia.com> Like all of you, we at Team Flowers are paying close attention to the arguments being made at the U.S. Supreme Court this week over whether or not to overturn Roe v Wade and gut abortion protections for millions of Americans. **Elizabeth Warren, Amy Klobuchar, and others in Congress have proposed using the Democratic majority to codify Roe into law. ** [**So we want to hear from you. Add your name to our petition if you think Congress should codify Roe vs Wade into law!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39374302/319550858/-1481163398?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODIxY2Q1My0yNzU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Iywu4vgBLieN9INSVXBMMqOtHShIPFL8brbIkPsrHxg=&emci=7e975c09-0456-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=4821cd53-2756-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=24979035) | **[ADD YOUR NAME>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39374303/319550859/-1481163398?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODIxY2Q1My0yNzU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Iywu4vgBLieN9INSVXBMMqOtHShIPFL8brbIkPsrHxg=&emci=7e975c09-0456-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=4821cd53-2756-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=24979035)**
---
It isn’t just Democrats calling on Congress to codify Roe into law. GOP Senator Susan Collins of Maine echoed Warren and Klobuchar in a statement this week: Senator Collins supports the right to an abortion and believes that the protections in the Roe and Casey decisions should be passed into law.
**[For now, we want to know what you think. Should Democrats codify Roe into law?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39374304/319550860/34719616?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODIxY2Q1My0yNzU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Iywu4vgBLieN9INSVXBMMqOtHShIPFL8brbIkPsrHxg=&emci=7e975c09-0456-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=4821cd53-2756-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=24979035) **
Thanks for sharing,
Team Flowers for Congress

Marcus Flowers is a Democrat running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene. As an Army Veteran, Marcus understands the true meaning of service and patriotism and will work tirelessly to defeat the hatred of the alt-right. **This election is going to be tough, but with the help of grassroots donors like you -- anything is possible.** | [**CONTRIBUTE »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39374305/319550861/-825069922?refcode=2021205_mf_roe2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ODIxY2Q1My0yNzU2LWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Iywu4vgBLieN9INSVXBMMqOtHShIPFL8brbIkPsrHxg=)

name: Senate Conservatives
subject: Senate Vote on Vax Mandate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
| |
---
Peter

When Joe Biden announced his illegal, unconstitutional vaccine mandate, Senate conservatives didn't whine or fidget. They acted:

▶︎ Within hours of the mandate's announcement, Sen. Mike Braun (R-IN) had drafted a letter telling Senate leadership that he would _**not vote for any government spending bills that funded the vaccine mandate.**_

▶︎ By the time Sen. Braun's letter was released, a dozen other members had signed on.

▶︎ As more Republicans in the House and the Senate joined the defund fight, _**all 50 Senate Republicans**_ took the next step and triggered a process to force a December vote in the House and Senate to rescind Biden's vaccine order. Now _**all Democrats**_ will have to go on record defending Biden's un-American policy - or the mandate will be toast.

This is how you win a fight in Washington. One punch... then another... then another. Unlike the Left, conservatives can't wait for the media or Hollywood or Big Tech to fight for us. We have to do it ourselves.

That can be daunting in a city hostile to conservative values. But as you know, and as Senate Conservatives Fund has been arguing for years, **COURAGE COUNTS**.

**[ Please help us elect more courageous conservatives! ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58937506:6nvnaQErN:m:1:3253819041:68189713FAA76A371B6D40C56952F73C:r) **

When a federal appeals court ordered Biden to halt his vaccine mandate pending further litigation, the White House initially and smugly told federal agencies to ignore the court.

But Senate conservatives didn't back down. And as more Republicans joined the fight, the Biden Administration reversed course and have now suspended enforcement of the mandate!

Thanks to conservative leadership, for now, **THERE IS NO BIDEN VACCINE MANDATE**.

None of this would be happening if Senate conservatives answered Biden's assault on our freedoms with empty tweets and press releases. **They are SENATORS, not just pundits.** And they acted like it!

On this defining vaccine mandate issue, conservatives are leading and Republicans are winning.

** [ We need your help to support conservative leadership in the Senate so please make a contribution to SCF today! ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58937506:6nvnaQErN:m:1:3253819041:68189713FAA76A371B6D40C56952F73C:r) **

SCF is proud to support Mike Braun and his colleagues leading the fight against the Biden vaccine mandate. And we will continue to support Senate candidates who are ready to join the fight.

_The defunding vote is coming soon._

**[ Please help us push the Senate to join conservatives in stopping Biden's vaccine mandate. ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58937506:6nvnaQErN:m:1:3253819041:68189713FAA76A371B6D40C56952F73C:r) **

Thank you for considering this urgent request and for doing so much to help fight for America's future.

Sincerely,
Mary Vought
Executive Director
Senate Conservatives Fund
|
---
|
---
| [ DONATE ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58937506:6nvnaQErN:m:1:3253819041:68189713FAA76A371B6D40C56952F73C:r "DONATE")
---
Senate Conservatives Fund
300 Independence Ave SE
Washington, DC 20003
|
---
Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change Washington.

Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not permitted. Federal law requires us to report the name, mailing address, occupation and employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year. Not paid for at taxpayer expense.
|
---

body:
We know where President Trump stands...

| [ ](https://go.electrepublicans.org/182350029614723320?utm_content=logo&sc=hd&amt1=10&amt2=15&amt3=30&amt4=70&amt5=100&amt6=150&amt7=200&money_bomb=true&recurring=true&deadline=11%3A59+PM+TONIGHT&e=1a1fe10c9303676f5a8934f3586944e0&utm_source=electrepublicans&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=153196727268159513&n=1) Peter, When President Trump started campaigning to reclaim the Senate Majority and Save America, one of the very first people he endorsed was Republican Senator Tim Scott. Here’s what he said: “It is my great honor to give Senator Tim Scott of South Carolina my Complete and Total Endorsement. He is both an outstanding Senator and person who works tirelessly for the people of his great state, and the USA. Strong on the Military, Law Enforcement, loves our Vets, protects our Second Amendment and our Borders. Tim will continue to do an OUTSTANDING job for our country!” _— President Donald J. Trump (March 2, 2021)_ _President Trump has given Tim Scott his Complete and Total Endorsement.Will you do the same?_ **[ADD YOUR NAME and confirm whether you Stand with Trump in supporting Republican Tim Scott for re-election to the United States Senate.](https://go.electrepublicans.org/182350029614723320?utm_content=text-hard_ask&sc=hd&amt1=10&amt2=15&amt3=30&amt4=70&amt5=100&amt6=150&amt7=200&money_bomb=true&recurring=true&deadline=11%3A59+PM+TONIGHT&e=1a1fe10c9303676f5a8934f3586944e0&utm_source=electrepublicans&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=153196727268159513&n=2)** |

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To unsubscribe from future emails, [click here](https://www.electrepublicans.org/unsubscribe?e=1a1fe10c9303676f5a8934f3586944e0&utm_source=electrepublicans&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=153196727268159513&n=6).

clean_body: We know where President Trump stands... | Peter, When President Trump started campaigning to reclaim the Senate Majority and Save America, one of the very first people he endorsed was Republican Senator Tim Scott. Here’s what he said: “It is my great honor to give Senator Tim Scott of South Carolina my Complete and Total Endorsement. He is both an outstanding Senator and person who works tirelessly for the people of his great state, and the USA. Strong on the Military, Law Enforcement, loves our Vets, protects our Second Amendment and our Borders. Tim will continue to do an OUTSTANDING job for our country!” — President Donald J. Trump (March 2, 2021) President Trump has given Tim Scott his Complete and Total Endorsement.Will you do the same? | ENDORSE TIM SCOTT EMAIL: SUPPORTER ID: #040945 DEADLINE: 11:59 PM TONIGHT | | Last time, the Democrats spent more than $100 million attacking Trump-ally Lindsey Graham in South Carolina. Now, they’re using all the fundraising, field, and campaigning infrastructure they built to attack Trump-Endorsed Senator Tim Scott. We have to defend Tim Scott and keep South Carolina Republican. Everything depends on it! Do we have your support, Peter? Please let us know by adding your name right away. Thank you. Tim Scott Alerts Sent via Elect Republicans

YOU are the reason I'm in Congress today, and YOU will be the reason I'm able to continue our mission for small businesses, low taxes, cutting back unnecessary government spending, more educational opportunities for our children, fixing our broken immigration system, and keeping the American Dream alive for future generations. body:
Can we count on you? | | **TOP TRUMP AIDE MARK MEADOWS:
_If House Republicans retake the House, "I would love to see the gavel go from Nancy Pelosi to Donald Trump."_**

| We're LIVID.

Trump's top aide is calling for Republicans to install Donald Trump as Speaker of the House. _WHAT?!_

We refuse to let that happen \-- but we need you by our side.

**So before midnight, can we count on you to sign on and commit to PROTECTING Speaker Pelosi 's House Majority so that the People's Gavel never falls into Trump's hands? >>**
---
[**NAME:** dpwillis67@gmail.com
**GRASSROOTS DEMOCRAT ID:** #5907903](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Eqxzt_)[
**PETITION SIGNATURE STATUS:** **MISSING******](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Eqxzt_)
---
[SIGN THE PLEDGE TO COMMIT TO SUPPORTING HOUSE DEMOCRATS >>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/d30Et6Ng~4F-)
---

This situation is dire.

Donald Trump is intent on retaking power -- _and it 's clear his first step is destroying our House Majority._

Even worse, Trump and his House Republicans are on the verge of making our WORST nightmares come to life:

\-- They only need to flip**FIVE** seats to destroy our Majority.
\-- They're **SURGING** ahead in the polls
\-- And they're armed with nearly **$68 MILLION** to defeat us.

This is serious: If we want to PROTECT our House Democrats, SAVE Speaker Pelosi's Majority, and STOP Trump's cronies in their tracks, we'll need help from our grassroots supporters like never before.

**That 's why we're calling on 45,000 grassroots Democrats to sign our pledge before midnight and commit to saving Speaker Pelosi's House Majority so that Trump NEVER gets his hands on the People's Gavel >>**
| [SIGN TO PLEDGE YOUR SUPPORT FOR OUR HOUSE DEMOCRATS >> ](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/Z6_Zc-)
---

Thank you,

DCCC

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters. However, if you'd just like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46052052&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE0MDUzNDQxNQS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com).

We're working hard to make sure we protect our Democratic Majority -- and to put an end to Republicans' obstruction for good. President Biden can't do it all. We need all hands on deck if we're going to fight back against Republicans and expand our historic Majority. Our success relies on grassroots supporters like you. 99% of our contributions come from grassroots donations, with an average gift of $19. If you'd like to unsubscribe from DCCC emails, click [here](http://action.dccc.org/page/s/dccc-e-mail-options?m=46052052&r=MTI3NTcwMTg1MDQyNQS2&j=MjE0MDUzNDQxNQS2&l=13780807&e=dpwillis67@gmail.com). If you'd like to make an online donation, click [here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/dcccactblue?amount=25&recurring=true). Thanks for your support of Democrats!

Contributions or gifts to the DCCC are not tax deductible.

name: Rand Paul
subject: Armed agents at your door?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for US Senate
body:
Parents have rights...

| | | |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://ct.klclick.com/f/a/ZLUMwICoeCvfdigE5_ETTg~~/AASl5QA~/RgRjj6pJP0RcaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUucmFuZHBhdWwuY29tL2RvbmF0ZT9fa3g9UGRNWmY1TnRmQXpiN0RLUzZjZ0FGTDZ0SXNqYzNUM0M3bEN4WmptYTVqUSUzRC5KelJjVUtXA3NwY0IKYY5JJa1hpbIJPFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAADY_c~)
---
| Dear Patriot, When I heard this news, my jaw hit the floor. Armed agents in Texas have been dispatched to the homes of private citizens to arrest parents who have the "wrong opinions" about Critical Race Theory. According to independent journalist Christopher Rufo,_"A minister and a veteran voiced opposition to the school board. The school district's police department, in coordination with the sheriff, sent armed agents to arrest them in their homes."_ This comes directly on the heels of AG Merrick Garland announcing that he would work with "local law enforcement" to crack down on parents who don't share his Left-wing views. He even said he was going to send FBI federal agents to crack down on these parents. Now, hearing this news out of Texas, it appears the message has been sent -- anyone who opposes the Left-wing agenda is fair game. **Whether or not you have children in the schools, this issue affects you.** It affects you because the Biden administration has made clear that conservative views should be criminalized. It affects you because intelligence agencies like the FBI, under orders from the Department of Justice, are going after innocent Americans for their political speech. And there is no telling who they will go after next. I have been warning about this for years. **The U.S. Intelligence Community has seized far too much power, and has stolen Americans' liberty in the name of "security."** From the beginning, they claimed those powers would never be used domestically. But now, these very agencies are targeting American citizens -- and conservatives are the ones under attack. In fact, the National School Boards Association demanded that the FBI use the Patriot Act against these parents! **I warned that this day would come.** I was a lonely voice for many years demanding that the Intelligence Community give up its extraordinary powers, and that the Constitution be restored. Now, there is a "Domestic War on Terror" taking place -- and it is being targeted directly at conservatives like you and I. Some in Congress are even trying to pass new "domestic terrorism" laws that would enhance the government's power and make conservatives an even greater target. Rep. Adam Schiff (D-CA) said in an interview,_"we need to elevate our response to domestic terrorism, to put it on a plane with our response to international terrorism."_ And they've made it clear who they think the domestic terrorists are – conservatives who speak their mind. If these laws managed to pass, episodes like the one in Texas would become routine. I am doing everything I can as a U.S. Senator to prevent these awful bills from passing. But I have a well-funded Democrat opponent next year. And if he defeats me, all bets are off. [Will you help me protect the Constitution by chipping in $100, $50, $25, or $10 right away?](https://ct.klclick.com/f/a/ZLUMwICoeCvfdigE5_ETTg~~/AASl5QA~/RgRjj6pJP0RcaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUucmFuZHBhdWwuY29tL2RvbmF0ZT9fa3g9UGRNWmY1TnRmQXpiN0RLUzZjZ0FGTDZ0SXNqYzNUM0M3bEN4WmptYTVqUSUzRC5KelJjVUtXA3NwY0IKYY5JJa1hpbIJPFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAADY_c~) Merrick Garland is already unleashing the power of the federal government on innocent parents for having conservative views. And Adam Schiff, Nancy Pelosi, and Joe Biden are waiting in the wings to pass legislation to give him even more power. The Constitution is under serious threat. **A "Domestic War on Terror" is a perversion of everything the Founding Fathers tried to create when they drafted the Constitution.** I am utilizing my full power as a U.S. Senator to stop this from taking place. But the Democrats are actively trying to take me out. They are pouring money into the coffers of my Democratic opponent. And if he manages to defeat me, and the 50-50 tie in the Senate is broken, the Democratic Party will have full control. I refuse to let that happen. [Will you please stand with me in my defense of the Constitution by pitching in $100, $50, $25, or $10 immediately?](https://ct.klclick.com/f/a/ZLUMwICoeCvfdigE5_ETTg~~/AASl5QA~/RgRjj6pJP0RcaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUucmFuZHBhdWwuY29tL2RvbmF0ZT9fa3g9UGRNWmY1TnRmQXpiN0RLUzZjZ0FGTDZ0SXNqYzNUM0M3bEN4WmptYTVqUSUzRC5KelJjVUtXA3NwY0IKYY5JJa1hpbIJPFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAADY_c~) In Liberty, Rand Paul
---
|
---
| [Donate](https://ct.klclick.com/f/a/ZLUMwICoeCvfdigE5_ETTg~~/AASl5QA~/RgRjj6pJP0RcaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUucmFuZHBhdWwuY29tL2RvbmF0ZT9fa3g9UGRNWmY1TnRmQXpiN0RLUzZjZ0FGTDZ0SXNqYzNUM0M3bEN4WmptYTVqUSUzRC5KelJjVUtXA3NwY0IKYY5JJa1hpbIJPFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAADY_c~)
---
|
---
| **** P.S. Armed agents in Texas are arresting parents in their homes for opposing Critical Race Theory at school board meetings. This comes on the heels of the Department of Justice and the FBI taking aim at innocent parents for their free speech, after the National School Boards Association labeled them as "terrorists." And some members of Congress are trying to pass legislation to enhance the government's powers in this so-called "Domestic War on Terror." I have been warning about this for years. And I am using my full power as a U.S. Senator to prevent this from taking place. But the Democrats are targeting my Senate seat, with an eye on passing new legislation like this. [Will you make a generous contribution of $100, $50, $25, or $10 right away so that does not happen?](https://ct.klclick.com/f/a/ZLUMwICoeCvfdigE5_ETTg~~/AASl5QA~/RgRjj6pJP0RcaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUucmFuZHBhdWwuY29tL2RvbmF0ZT9fa3g9UGRNWmY1TnRmQXpiN0RLUzZjZ0FGTDZ0SXNqYzNUM0M3bEN4WmptYTVqUSUzRC5KelJjVUtXA3NwY0IKYY5JJa1hpbIJPFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAADY_c~)
---
|
---
| [Donate](https://ct.klclick.com/f/a/ZLUMwICoeCvfdigE5_ETTg~~/AASl5QA~/RgRjj6pJP0RcaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUucmFuZHBhdWwuY29tL2RvbmF0ZT9fa3g9UGRNWmY1TnRmQXpiN0RLUzZjZ0FGTDZ0SXNqYzNUM0M3bEN4WmptYTVqUSUzRC5KelJjVUtXA3NwY0IKYY5JJa1hpbIJPFIUZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb21YBAADY_c~)

|

name: D'Arrigo for Congress
subject: Demand a living wage for everyone.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Melanie Darrigo
body:
| | | The minimum wage has lost 21% of its value since Congress last raised it 12 years ago.
[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkzwG6Xmtb75Ut3vFHKuVDvoU4L16TB-iK6qV35enQneyoac-3wlk6xsoUuLvYI2nFOvZsYLsHFwUIjJX9VAIwrHX0-1N8FGOO4oaj5tq24nhfUPg6B0ih_Dw7cCwTSl-bqYsb3S3KT9qk8PdMo5MSnQia9XiomeGpVqjWbI55Zz04R9QZ6GRSFDhuROVwNOH2l81Fn5KMidaTzeU-IsJnfj_40HQfD7mIN9ed0KyPsTwna82lKchKp8L3tZfF6ugR44ui7MdMOKq5uR9AyUwM24GoKOir1GUzhkGZDyi90lMyON0hPcq_KUcKu2JxXvxLpCcyIKkIZQBcgGDhotpPlKlAQbw05r9LpezLKid8RLBYIaqukrKi9JV8cladTfqZBgRQVYqsjkxfyB1_T1e3qnbBgUxwAXEHJmVQg5X7PM2ntduiMvcQ63w1iThkCMClEL4Pi90J_OLS7xHyw9m6OgEurRH6VtBMbwe0Lat-sc3kKT81R-xMXSCCmA9A0wMO28gFdSWO4HOjs5U-v0xvv/3hl/wOEViKlMSDGyb9qLGauBEA/h0/SEEK_t3VmDWX9sCqUliA6ddOUMK7-kxdxQe4s9ARko0)[**Everyone deserves a living wage. Demand Congress raise the minimum wage to $15 an hour!**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkzwG6Xmtb75Ut3vFHKuVDvoU4L16TB-iK6qV35enQneyoac-3wlk6xsoUuLvYI2nFOvZsYLsHFwUIjJX9VAIwrHX0-1N8FGOO4oaj5tq24nhfUPg6B0ih_Dw7cCwTSl-bqYsb3S3KT9qk8PdMo5MSnQia9XiomeGpVqjWbI55Zz04R9QZ6GRSFDhuROVwNOH2l81Fn5KMidaTzeU-IsJnfj_40HQfD7mIN9ed0KyPsTwna82lKchKp8L3tZfF6ugR44ui7MdMOKq5uR9AyUwM24GoKOir1GUzhkGZDyi90lMyON0hPcq_KUcKu2JxXvxLAhQzSCyZXYTa1vZrD4aQ8nK79KdeDNZSnVWYYQCC1hK3bmS23OGBxCMSLyTsyFk7Q2Vo0sfFdn40igUfaUCeYZ5l1idx1PHcRa2ZsVhSEgMnhaNDa4XwkGLBH_KAt-9BqN8ZzBG106dA1L-YsqGrZWxIzZRPW0jmkwaVGufhewxEOl3ZULNMZFvv9r5odOfSj2ydpHElfkqyQWDG4cQOC/3hl/wOEViKlMSDGyb9qLGauBEA/h1/qDdqaT7AKUFFezl6UtahgzcCR1BuzSB900WHgtZaFv0)
There’s nowhere in America where the $7.25 per hour minimum wage, a mere $15,000 annually for a full-time job, can be considered a liveable wage.
While billionaires make record gains in their wealth, workers on the federal minimum wage haven’t had a raise since 2009, losing 21% of their purchasing power to inflation and the rising cost of living.
**In Congress, Melanie D’Arrigo will demand a fair, livable wage for everyone.**
**[Sign the petition and tell Congress to raise the minimum wage now!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkzwG6Xmtb75Ut3vFHKuVDvoU4L16TB-iK6qV35enQneyoac-3wlk6xsoUuLvYI2nFOvZsYLsHFwUIjJX9VAIwrHX0-1N8FGOO4oaj5tq24nhfUPg6B0ih_Dw7cCwTSl-bqYsb3S3KT9qk8PdMo5MSnQia9XiomeGpVqjWbI55Zz04R9QZ6GRSFDhuROVwNOH2l81Fn5KMidaTzeU-IsJnfj_40HQfD7mIN9ed0KyPsTwna82lKchKp8L3tZfF6ugR44ui7MdMOKq5uR9AyUwM24GoKOir1GUzhkGZDyi90lMyON0hPcq_KUcKu2JxXvxKbx4r9WNf9F2JWYZt_pgNhyJD6O8MvWpXmazymahAqNKfFXeK5TVu33dXFHmWIYlIITnAnokw6UsKSD3fZJ9W4ttuVjqNC8bZoaiXzc0UTs54aXugXvbO9cMxKEHCYR2tEL0hsmVujt_7zhNUz0Rhg9ppw180WaBtazaPoTiVXF7-Fneum6rDQWSehSfGKe-JYiPR8xlWhzajmusPRGSBF/3hl/wOEViKlMSDGyb9qLGauBEA/h2/dpye8HAY7SPhkuJfzQ51LuPINmqyXxg3bgUuj7otBqo)**
American taxpayers spend over $150 _billion_ a year subsidizing companies like Wal-Mart and McDonalds so they can continue paying their employees poverty wages.
Big corporations are padding their profits while we foot the bill for the government benefits low-wage workers rely on to afford the bare necessities for their families.
**An equitable economy is built from the worker, up, not the billionaires down.**

clean_body: | | | The minimum wage has lost 21% of its value since Congress last raised it 12 years ago. There’s nowhere in America where the $7.25 per hour minimum wage, a mere $15,000 annually for a full-time job, can be considered a liveable wage. While billionaires make record gains in their wealth, workers on the federal minimum wage haven’t had a raise since 2009, losing 21% of their purchasing power to inflation and the rising cost of living. In Congress, Melanie D’Arrigo will demand a fair, livable wage for everyone. American taxpayers spend over $150 billion a year subsidizing companies like Wal-Mart and McDonalds so they can continue paying their employees poverty wages. Big corporations are padding their profits while we foot the bill for the government benefits low-wage workers rely on to afford the bare necessities for their families. An equitable economy is built from the worker, up, not the billionaires down. Thanks for taking action today. \-- D’Arrigo for Congress | is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. Our movement isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means we need your support. If you’d rather contribute by check, feel free to make the check out to the following address: Friends of Melanie Darrigo P.O. name: Jake Duesenberg
subject: A Couple Tickets Remaining
body:
| Peter -- I'm humbled by the amount of people who want to attend our End-of-Year Christmas Event this Wednesday, December 8th at the Mermaid. Thanks to the success, we increased the Giveaway to 4 guns! You don't need to buy a raffle, just purchasing a ticket for the event automatically registers you for a chance to win. [](https://www.action4liberty.com/christmas_event_20211208?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_2021_5_0&n=1) Because of the HUGE response, we will not be able to sell tickets at the door. **And there are only 25 tickets left!** So please REGISTER NOW if you want to come. | [](https://www.action4liberty.com/christmas_event_20211208?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_2021_5_0&n=2 "REGISTER NOW") [REGISTER NOW](https://www.action4liberty.com/christmas_event_20211208?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_2021_5_0&n=2)
---
Come meet the one state legislator who is so feared and hated in the Swamp that he already has two Democrat opponents and one Establishment Republican running against him. Rep Erik Mortensen is going to tell you what is behind the smoke screen at the Capitol!
[](https://www.action4liberty.com/christmas_event_20211208?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_2021_5_0&n=3)
We also have Kyle Hooten from Alpha News, the nurses leading the Rally for Vaccine Choice group and we'll be announcing our annual activist awards.
**Tickets are $50 and includes dinner and a chance to win a bunch of guns, including the Non-Biden Approved AR-15.**
I look forward to seeing you in person THIS WEDNESDAY and am very excited to discuss with you what we have planned for 2022.
## **WHEN: Wednesday, Dec 8th (Doors open at 5:00pm)**
## **WHERE: The Mermaid, Mounds View**
## **[YES, I WANT TO REGISTER FOR THIS AWESOME EVENT AND ENTER FOR A CHANCE TO WIN AN AR-15](https://www.action4liberty.com/christmas_event_20211208?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_2021_5_0&n=4)**
[No, Fauci would not approve of me attending an event unmasked](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=NG1nPCFF95akkTuqDYWYj5HHUPR3Ilhyzn6HSlqvLsOS5-GZYT00FQUg4DVQUBLS&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_2021_5_0&n=5)
See you on Dec 8th!

Jake Duesenberg
[](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_2021_5_0&n=6)[](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_2021_5_0&n=7)[](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_2021_5_0&n=8)[](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_2021_5_0&n=9)[http://www.action4liberty.com/](http://www.action4liberty.com/?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_2021_5_0&n=10)
-=-=- Freedom Email · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.action4liberty.com/unsubscribe?e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_2021_5_0&n=11).
You can also keep up with Jake Duesenberg on [Facebook](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nyVoJL5zCIi1gu8lCoYmQrA8P7rhuOjJmdy-IRmglie&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_2021_5_0&n=12). -=-=-
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.action4liberty.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=44f3e77e3a436673570805f6f24387d1&utm_source=action4liberty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=christmas_event_2021_5_0&n=13), software for leaders.

clean_body: | | | | It’s because of Joe Biden Friend, It’s NO secret that families, small businesses, and restaurants all around Alaska and our country are hurting from the record-breaking inflation! Just about everything has become more expensive in Joe Biden’s America, and YOU are paying the price for it! It’s gotten to the point where you can expect to pay more for less. There’s only one thing to blame for the current economic mess we're in and that’s J oe Biden and the Radical Left’s Socialist policies. And guess who supports those policies? Liberal Lisa Murkowski! Biden’s Chief Enabling Officer! I will always put ALL Alaskans first and especially stand up for our small businesses and restaurants who are hurting with the increased costs of supplies. It is crucial we fight Bidenflation, especially as we head into the holiday season and into 2022. Joe Biden has made the American people struggle for far too long. Thanks, Kelly | | | | ==

When the 700,000 people that live in D.C. vote next year, they won’t vote for a Senator, and their elected Representative in the House can’t vote on bills.

**We’ll be frank:** We’re running out of time to make statehood a reality.

Right now, we have the momentum to finish the job and make D.C. the 51st state. This would create two more Democratic Senators and protect our Majority, Peter!

name: Quick Poll via Tim Ryan HQ
subject: Who is the Ohio GOP’s biggest clown?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1632%2E3611125%2EsBinip ][IMG]

Folks, the Ohio GOP Senate primary is filled with Trump wannabes,
far-right extremists, and millionaire elitists -- in other words, folks
who are just out of touch with reality.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/EM_BS_RYA_211205_EN_GOPBiggestClown_A0_na_U1_X1_M1?t=1007&akid=1632%2E3611125%2EsBinip ]But we’ve got to know: which GOP candidate do you think is the biggest
clown?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/EM_BS_RYA_211205_EN_GOPBiggestClown_A0_na_U1_X1_M1?t=1010&akid=1632%2E3611125%2EsBinip ]JD Vance, Jane Timken, Josh Mandel

There’s JD Vance whose garbage book belittled and blamed the working class
-- he’s endorsed by insurrectionist Senator Josh Hawley, and backed by
tech billionaire Peter Thiel’s $10 million super PAC.

There’s Jane Timken who put out a campaign ad titled “Fire Fauci” and said
she’s looking forward to “tackling” Tim. What?!?

And there’s Josh Mandel who’s likened mask mandates to Nazi Germany,
doesn’t believe in the separation of church and state, and still insists
the election was stolen from Donald Trump.

Our right-wing extremists are quite the motley crew. [ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/EM_BS_RYA_211205_EN_GOPBiggestClown_A0_na_U1_X1_M1?t=1008&akid=1632%2E3611125%2EsBinip ]But we’d love to
know: who do you think is the Ohio GOP’s biggest clown?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/EM_BS_RYA_211205_EN_GOPBiggestClown_A0_na_U1_X1_M1?t=1011&akid=1632%2E3611125%2EsBinip ]JD Vance, Jane Timken, Josh Mandel

[ https://act.timforoh.com/signup/EM_BS_RYA_211205_EN_GOPBiggestClown_A0_na_U1_X1_M1?t=1012&akid=1632%2E3611125%2EsBinip ]Vote Now >>

Better luck next time to all the losers!

-- Team Ryan

body:

| | | **BREAKING: Biden announces he’s REPLACING two Trump loyalists on the USPS Board of Governors!**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/5896?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211205-Developing-USPSNominees-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211205-Developing-USPSNominees-Pros-sl1&akid=2149%2E9716520%2EMOHfe9)

Do you approve of President Biden's plan to save the Postal Service?** | | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/5896?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211205-Developing-USPSNominees-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211205-Developing-USPSNominees-Pros-sl1&akid=2149%2E9716520%2EMOHfe9)

_Deadline: MIDNIGHT_
Team -- Joe Biden is moving fast to reverse YEARS of Trump-era sabotage of the U.S. Postal Service -- including by nominating TWO new members of the USPS Board of Governors!

This board has the power to finally hold Postmaster General Louis DeJoy accountable and REVERSE his disastrous mail slowdowns, post office closures, and more -- but Trump's appointees still have a two-seat majority on the board!

**If President Biden's new nominees are confirmed, they could help SAVE the USPS, so we need 50,000 Democrats to answer our Live Poll by MIDNIGHT to weigh in on the future of the USPS:**
**LIVE POLL:
Do you approve of President Biden's plan to save the Postal Service?** | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/5896?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211205-Developing-USPSNominees-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211205-Developing-USPSNominees-Pros-sl1&akid=2149%2E9716520%2EMOHfe9)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Bill=20Olson?=
subject: High gas prices?? Blame Biden!!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Need to send him a message! |
---
| | [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=73c3b4553f&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Hi Peter,

Let's face it: Joe Biden is a screw-up.

_This guy can't do anything right. He screwed up Afghanistan, screwed up COVID response, screwing up the economy. And now, he's intentionally giving us higher gas prices._

Joe Biden hates America and hates Americans. That's the only way to put it. It's time to put a stop to him!

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a Christian and a combat vet [running to reclaim Florida's 9th district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=6028b452a8&e=afa21b7626), a swing district in the Orlando area last held by Republicans in 2013. This is a targeted district by the NRCC because, in a string Republican year, we are going to flip it to Red!**

It will be a strong Republican year in 2022, particularly in the Red-trending Free State of Florida, because of boneheaded Biden policies like hiking the price of gas.
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=f651324ddb&e=afa21b7626)
---
| The slavish Leftist devotion to climate alarmism is to blame for this. Biden lacks the mental capacity to stand up to the extremist Socialists.

The Socialists and crazy Left WANTS higher gas prices. They think that this will result in lower emissions.

Biden's extremist Energy Secretary, the woefully inept Jennifer Granholm, touts energy price hikes:

_U.S. Energy Secretary Jennifer Granholm laughed at the nation’s high gas prices on Friday when asked about the administration’s strategy to ramp up supply to meet demand.

“[In] Sturgis, Michigan, it is $2.89 a gallon. I guess that’s better than in California,” said Bloomberg Host Tom Keene as gas prices reach all-time highs on the West Coast. “What is the Granholm plan to increase oil production in America?”

“That is hilarious,” Granholm said, throwing her head back with laughter as Americans cope with rising prices at the pump compounded by inflation._

In reality, the only thing this will ensure is inflation and poverty and misery. The Washington Examiner reports:

_Granholm also addressed the likelihood that Americans will be paying higher home utility bills over the winter, and resorted to another set of blame-shifting talking points on that subject, saying "We have the same problem in fuels that the supply chains have, which is that the oil and gas companies are not flipping the switch as quickly as the demand requires."

What an extraordinary statement that is, given the ongoing efforts by Granholm and the rest of the Biden administration to inhibit the ability of the domestic oil and gas industry to get its business done in this country. From cancelling major pipeline projects via executive order to refusing to schedule and hold court-ordered federal lease sales to the implementation of an array of onerous new regulations at the Interior Department and the EPA, this administration been waging war on the U.S. oil industry since literally the day it took office._

When the Biden regime declared war on oil and gas, it declared war on ordinary Americans. It declared war on the American economy.

Higher gas prices were the start of high milk prices, higher meat prices, and others.

_**It's time to blame Biden for what he has done. It's time to send him a clear, loud message that we don't accept his sabotage of America!**_
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=311b0bbe25&e=afa21b7626)
---
| **Even Dems are now asking Biden to reverse his course on his war on oil and gas. That's how bad his policies are.**

[I got more votes here in 2020 than any Republican ever had, because I stood bravely in the way of Biden and harshly railed against his Socialist policies. Will you help me finish the job and win this seat?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=3290e8aed3&e=afa21b7626)

_Darren Soto is a Socialist Democrat unwilling to break with Biden- a loyal Socialist to the end. Like Biden, he hates Americans too._

clean_body: Need to send him a message! | | | | Hi Peter, Let's face it: Joe Biden is a screw-up. This guy can't do anything right. He screwed up Afghanistan, screwed up COVID response, screwing up the economy. And now, he's intentionally giving us higher gas prices. Joe Biden hates America and hates Americans. That's the only way to put it. It's time to put a stop to him! My name is Bill Olson, and I am a Christian and a combat vet , a swing district in the Orlando area last held by Republicans in 2013. This is a targeted district by the NRCC because, in a string Republican year, we are going to flip it to Red! It will be a strong Republican year in 2022, particularly in the Red-trending Free State of Florida, because of boneheaded Biden policies like hiking the price of gas. | | The slavish Leftist devotion to climate alarmism is to blame for this. Biden lacks the mental capacity to stand up to the extremist Socialists. The Socialists and crazy Left WANTS higher gas prices. They think that this will result in lower emissions. Biden's extremist Energy Secretary, the woefully inept Jennifer Granholm, touts energy price hikes: U.S. Energy Secretary Jennifer Granholm laughed at the nation’s high gas prices on Friday when asked about the administration’s strategy to ramp up supply to meet demand. “[In] Sturgis, Michigan, it is $2.89 a gallon. I guess that’s better than in California,” said Bloomberg Host Tom Keene as gas prices reach all-time highs on the West Coast. “What is the Granholm plan to increase oil production in America?” “That is hilarious,” Granholm said, throwing her head back with laughter as Americans cope with rising prices at the pump compounded by inflation. In reality, the only thing this will ensure is inflation and poverty and misery. The Washington Examiner reports: Granholm also addressed the likelihood that Americans will be paying higher home utility bills over the winter, and resorted to another set of blame-shifting talking points on that subject, saying "We have the same problem in fuels that the supply chains have, which is that the oil and gas companies are not flipping the switch as quickly as the demand requires." What an extraordinary statement that is, given the ongoing efforts by Granholm and the rest of the Biden administration to inhibit the ability of the domestic oil and gas industry to get its business done in this country. From cancelling major pipeline projects via executive order to refusing to schedule and hold court-ordered federal lease sales to the implementation of an array of onerous new regulations at the Interior Department and the EPA, this administration been waging war on the U.S. oil industry since literally the day it took office. When the Biden regime declared war on oil and gas, it declared war on ordinary Americans. It declared war on the American economy. Higher gas prices were the start of high milk prices, higher meat prices, and others. It's time to blame Biden for what he has done. It's time to send him a clear, loud message that we don't accept his sabotage of America! | | Even Dems are now asking Biden to reverse his course on his war on oil and gas. That's how bad his policies are. Darren Soto is a Socialist Democrat unwilling to break with Biden- a loyal Socialist to the end. Like Biden, he hates Americans too. Help me stand for everyday Americans who want no part of Biden's climate alarmism! | | Bill Olson Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars Supports President Trump Not a Career Politician Hard Core Conservative Fighter | | P.S. name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: Liz Cheney tried to lay a trap for 45
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Stop Lyin Liz |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=db87864492&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
My name is Mark Finchem. I am the proud Arizona Representative leading the way in election integrity: from pioneering the Maricopa audit to developing world-class watermarks and security systems to verify and solidify ballot-integrity, I fight every day to make sure our elections are protected.
---
|
---
| **This is why I am running for Secretary of State of Arizona. We desperately need our elections cleaned up. I am a six-sigma process engineer – I know how to get this job done.**

_[You can support my campaign here. ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=cf6fef1764&e=44b8c466b0) Right now, we are fighting back against the media that is silencing our movement. Every dollar helps tremendously._

President Trump just put out a challenge...
---
|
---
| _“It’s really interesting, everybody wants me on television, I get the highest ratings by far, they need ratings to survive, and yet I put out a challenge to debate me about the massive election fraud, which took place in the 2020 Presidential Election, and there are no takers – think of it, zero takers for the so-called ‘ratings machine.’_

_The reason is, they know they can’t win. All I have to do is lay out the facts- they are irrefutable. I’ve supposedly won all my political debates, but this would be the easiest of them all! Swing state by swing state, they get decimated. This is the Hoax and the Scam and the Crime of the Century. Just remember, no takers!”_

**A very reasonable challenge, and something which needs to be done. But no one will even engage. _This is how scared the media is of letting the true narrative of the election integrity movement get out! They won’t let it happen!_**
---
|
---
| **RINO Turncoat Liz Cheney is threatening our President so that if he brings up election integrity, she will try and trap him and punish him for speaking the truth.**

**_The Gateway Pundit Reports:_**

_Vicious Liz Cheney is now openly threatening President Trump._

_The turncoat Republican and serial liar warned President Trump that any “lying” about the election results could result in criminal penalties._

_Cheney hopes that if she gaslights the American public long enough they will excuse the fraud in the 2020 election._

_Weakling GOP House Leader Kevin McCarthy allows this from Republican Caucus members._

_They both need to go._

**_Yes, in America this is what political debates have come to. One side trying to speak the truth, and the other threatening to throw you in jail if you disagree with them._**

This isn’t America. This isn’t Freedom. This is Maoist. **Silence those who disagree with you so no one learns the truth.**

_[And this is why I need your help.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=6015fded9e&e=44b8c466b0) Every day we are fighting to loudly proclaim the truth of election integrity and put pressure on AG Mark Brnovich to demand perp walks! [Please donate today with anything you can! Make a rush donation of $50 tonight to help us keep up the pressure!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7a595e03af&e=44b8c466b0)_
---
| [Thank you and God bless you!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=f0de0e82cb&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=34b4f17cee&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737

clean_body: | | Peter -- I want to take a moment and thank everyone who pitched in to support Future Generations last month. I know you get a lot of emails from different political organizations and campaigns, and I really appreciate you taking the time to read ours. When you read our emails it actually helps make sure our message reaches more people! We founded Future Generations to build for the future. From humble beginnings last year, we scored some big wins by helping to re-elect Green New Deal champion Sen. Ed Markey, and sending first-time candidates like Cori Bush to Congress. We also won some crucial down-ballot races in Texas that laid the foundation for future progressive victories in the nation's biggest swing state. We've grown so much over the last year, but we need to keep building to win in 2022 -- and beyond. You can help us elect candidates who will fight #ForTheFuture by becoming a sustaining donor. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: If you can't commit to a monthly contribution right now, I understand. Even a one-time donation today would be so helpful as we scale up for victory in 2022! Another great way to help is by signing up to volunteer. The more volunteers we have, the more candidates we'll be able to support. Whatever your skillset may be, and however many hours you have to spare, there is some way that you can make an impact on this movement -- and we would love to have you on the team. Thank you for being a part of this movement and giving us hope. It means so much to our team and all the candidates fighting for our future. In solidarity, Roza | | Future Generations is a youth-founded, youth-led movement guided by the Seventh Generations philosophy, building a sustainable world for the next seven generations. We partner with progressives up and down the ballot to stop the climate crisis, fighting for universal healthcare, racial and economic justice. We don't take money from corporate PACs or lobbyists. In 2020 we helped re-elect GND champion Sen. Ed Markey and flipped crucial down-ballot seats. We're building a powerful slate for 2022, and we need your help. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: This primary
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Early voting for our first 2022 primary is less than 75 days away. Justice
Democrat Jessica Cisneros is taking on anti-abortion corporate Democrat
Henry Cuellar in Texas’ 28th Congressional District.

As soon as polls open and mail ballots arrive to voters in TX-28, we need
to ensure folks are ready to elect Jessica — a progressive fighter for the
people. Cuellar is backed by Wall Street, Exxon, private prisons, and
votes against abortion rights, immigrant justice, and stronger labor
protections. He’s the most conservative Democrat in the House. We need to
defeat Cuellar.

Jessica can win this race. But here’s the thing: Nearly 90% of
Congressional races are won by the candidate who spends more money. Most
recent data shows that Cuellar has more than *$2 million* in his campaign
account. Jessica has just a fraction of that, but with our support and the
support of grassroots donors like you, we can still win.

Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez’s opponent in 2018 spent at least 5 times more
than she did in the primary election. AOC won because she was what NY-14
needed, had a strong campaign, and a strong message. We helped her build
that campaign.

We’re doing the same thing for Jessica’s campaign, but we don’t know if we
can get outspent 5-to-1 and still come out on top. The Wall Street, fossil
fuel, and corporate PAC money will keep flowing to Cuellar as primary day
approaches. We’re relying on a flood of grassroots donations — $5, $27,
$50, whatever folks can afford — to help us close this fundraising gap.

The political establishment will do absolutely everything it can to stop
more Justice Democrats from winning a seat in Congress. Corporate
Democrats don’t want to see Jessica and her support for Medicare for All

clean_body: [1]Justice Democrats Peter, Early voting for our first 2022 primary is less than 75 days away. Justice Democrat Jessica Cisneros is taking on anti-abortion corporate Democrat Henry Cuellar in Texas’ 28th Congressional District. As soon as polls open and mail ballots arrive to voters in TX-28, we need to ensure folks are ready to elect Jessica — a progressive fighter for the people. Cuellar is backed by Wall Street, Exxon, private prisons, and votes against abortion rights, immigrant justice, and stronger labor protections. He’s the most conservative Democrat in the House. We need to defeat Cuellar. Jessica can win this race. But here’s the thing: Nearly 90% of Congressional races are won by the candidate who spends more money. Most recent data shows that Cuellar has more than $2 million in his campaign account. Jessica has just a fraction of that, but with our support and the support of grassroots donors like you, we can still win. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez’s opponent in 2018 spent at least 5 times more than she did in the primary election. AOC won because she was what NY-14 needed, had a strong campaign, and a strong message. We helped her build that campaign. We’re doing the same thing for Jessica’s campaign, but we don’t know if we can get outspent 5-to-1 and still come out on top. The Wall Street, fossil fuel, and corporate PAC money will keep flowing to Cuellar as primary day approaches. We’re relying on a flood of grassroots donations — $5, $27, $50, whatever folks can afford — to help us close this fundraising gap. The political establishment will do absolutely everything it can to stop more Justice Democrats from winning a seat in Congress. Corporate Democrats don’t want to see Jessica and her support for Medicare for All and a Green New Deal unseat their friend, Rep. Cuellar. So, Peter, can you make your first contribution to defeat Cuellar and elect more Justice Democrats? Together, we’re building something special. We’re building a grassroots movement of folks from across the Central Valley to defeat Kevin McCarthy and bring real, progressive leadership back to our district by electing Bruno Amato. [**We want to tell you a bit more about the road ahead to elect Bruno, but before we do, can you make a contribution of just $2.22 — or whatever feels best to you — to make sure we have our strongest fundraising month yet? 2022 is just around the corner and with your help, we’ll hit the ground running.**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x-UnXZEV9rwWCU4oSd5EZQK5i5bJ0D_H_09LgcZp5uFHllSEbq6bEta080oT96tW51lWmpyo7Xb0rytvYLllQYJMlEoY0aKEla3CpWpmjmozcSX6Lr-2dbCZB-SSEa42vGC5epWsjCBGSsX3dirp14UGS-UjpE2n07mi7nUVe0xwOAD62kyA0CRJIamGVzf5jlY7DXQmWlLkwuQzaE8WRMDlCQ2tVJknj1HKZ-CD08SoYea0jq9m5aY4rKgdm7DGHyiW80IabmIUeu2xF5AM0aCk_JwMsO3Y_7v6posmoskyRizDdi0a-MhtfIB0q0eqNnvKJtVQvuM9lzD6hydkLx/3hl/eyOWkhsmQqOi6W2GHW71Ow/h1/5uC-c7Rsu3UWvx4tXycYFtjJ6e7Pb3SLUviuwJ_KjE4) [Contribute $2.22 »](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x-UnXZEV9rwWCU4oSd5EZQK5i5bJ0D_H_09LgcZp5uFHllSEbq6bEta080oT96tW7rWACsPmPlu7IyEyXoUZ8KOzmxiXBE4jIpVSeU62bgW-d_N7bn0KCs7RL9G6Zw9OSynsU9K96-aaY6jhP4qmkZjZ0E2NyAgsfxK9koAFhnDTSrdaT7YHUL_5SX3y4xCCInNVhXOLZhe7nU0crRWm53lfGMpmgadBq7cDZlGR9nipPLVAgyXUi_iXgZZNoWfZ1xNuNcIntbSIGbY0kia49N3CAWlM7S9rVReRSfiJvLAlvoRaHh8sTxxYjCsn3MxtorsH4DXL4apZ4g90EM8UvM/3hl/eyOWkhsmQqOi6W2GHW71Ow/h2/c3k_OizkvT_16qrujaBliT-LVrmSmwSWXY3HKpRYJ2M) When we launched this campaign back in February, we knew it was going to be a long shot.

We knew taking on the top Republican in Congress would be a tough fight.
But we knew that with a grassroots campaign, we could defy all odds and elect Bruno Amato — a veteran and longtime union member — to Congress. **And so far, with your help, we’ve accomplished so much together.** Thanks to you, we’re strategizing for our plan in the new year ahead. We’re making plans to hire more staff, continue building our grassroots field operation and make sure folks know that we have an opportunity to bring leadership that fights for the people to Congress. clean_body: | | | Together, we’re building something special. We’re building a grassroots movement of folks from across the Central Valley to defeat Kevin McCarthy and bring real, progressive leadership back to our district by electing Bruno Amato. When we launched this campaign back in February, we knew it was going to be a long shot. We knew taking on the top Republican in Congress would be a tough fight. But we knew that with a grassroots campaign, we could defy all odds and elect Bruno Amato — a veteran and longtime union member — to Congress. And so far, with your help, we’ve accomplished so much together. Thanks to you, we’re strategizing for our plan in the new year ahead. We’re making plans to hire more staff, continue building our grassroots field operation and make sure folks know that we have an opportunity to bring leadership that fights for the people to Congress. To make this all happen, we still need your help. Together, Team Bruno For Congress | | ---|--- Paid for by Bruno Amato for Congress PO BOX 22472 BAKERSFIELD, CA 93390
